title: AI Agent & Automation Expert (Remote | Full Time)
description:
We are looking for an AI Automation Expert who can build real, reliable, end-to-end AI solutions that improve efficiency, reduce manual work, and support our SEO, operations, and internal processes.



This role is for someone who has already built working AI agents, automation systems, and integrated workflows using LLMs, APIs, webhooks, and automation tools. We want someone who understands how to architect solutions, not just someone who can write prompts.



You must be able to show proof of automations you have personally built that solve business problems, streamline repetitive work, or improve output speed and accuracy.



?



What You Will Work On



• Designing and building AI-driven automations that support SEO work, reporting, content processing, audit workflows, data collection, and repeated operational tasks

• Creating AI agents that can handle multi-step workflows without constant human involvement

• Integrating LLMs with APIs, databases, task systems, and internal tools

• Improving the speed and quality of existing workflows using custom automation logic

• Identifying bottlenecks and proposing AI-powered or automation-powered solutions

• Maintaining, updating, and improving existing tools and agents



?



Requirements



• Proven experience building working AI agents or automation systems

• Strong understanding of LLMs, API integrations, and workflow automation

• Ability to design structured, multi-step workflows using tools like Python, Node, Zapier, Make, or custom solutions

• Ability to troubleshoot, refine, and optimize automations for reliability

• Experience with SEO-related automations is a plus but not required

• Strong problem-solving mindset and the ability to work independently

• Clear communication and organized documentation habits



?



Nice to Have



• Experience with vector databases, embeddings, and retrieval workflows

• Experience building internal tools or dashboards

• Familiarity with Chrome automation, scraping, or structured data extraction

• Familiarity with cloud hosting or serverless environments



?



What We Offer



• Full-time remote role

• Long-term stability and ongoing projects

• Competitive compensation based on skill level and experience

• Flexible work environment with clear expectations

• Opportunities to design high-impact solutions that shape real operations



?



How to Apply



Please apply with the following:



• Links, videos, repositories, or examples of AI agents or automations you have built

• A short explanation of what each solution does and how it works

• Your updated resume or OnlineJobs.ph profile



Applications without proof of past automation work will not be considered.

Warm Leads Only: No cold calling; you work strictly with pre-booked appointments.

title: AI Developer & Automation Specialist
description:
We are a fast-paced e-commerce company looking for a versatile AI Developer to build and manage our internal automated systems. We prioritize speed and execution, we need someone who can rapidly develop functional tools and workflows that solve immediate operational bottlenecks. The ideal candidate is a technical "all-rounder" who is deeply familiar with the current AI landscape and can deploy solutions using both no-code and custom-coded environments.



Key Responsibilities:

- System Development: Build and maintain internal dashboards and custom tool portals to centralize our team's AI resources.

- Workflow Automation: Design and manage complex automated sequences using n8n or Zapier to connect marketing, creative, and logistics data.

- AI Integration: Implement and optimize the latest models (Claude, GPT-4o) and agentic frameworks (OpenClaw/Clawdbot) into our daily business processes.

- Rapid Prototyping: Turn operational needs into working internal applications immediately. We value functional tools that work now over "perfect" systems that take weeks to build.

- Tech Stack Management: Manage API integrations, webhooks, and database connections to ensure seamless data flow across the company.



Technical Requirements:

- Experience: Minimum 1+ years of proven experience in AI automation and systems development.

- Automation Mastery: Advanced proficiency in n8n (preferred) or Zapier.

- AI Fluency: Up-to-date with the latest developments in the AI market, including Anthropic’s Claude, agentic workflows, and the OpenClaw ecosystem.

- Development Skills: Able to work with APIs, JSON, and basic scripting (JavaScript or Python) to extend automation beyond standard features.

- Fast-Paced Execution: Proven ability to work in high-pressure environments where speed of delivery is a primary metric.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram)
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram) — Luxury Brand

SALARY: $800–1,000 USD/month (based on portfolio)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand built on ancient mythology, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own how the brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



You'll produce short-form content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 30 seconds. Cinematic pacing, dark femininity, sometimes music-driven editing — designed for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume. You'll also work with our AI-generated personas, integrating them into edits and cinematic storytelling as the visual anchor of the brand.



We're hiring for Taste first. Your edits/videos make people feel something before they understand what they're looking at.



---



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Cinematic Storytelling. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. High-production value.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between aspirational and try-hard. Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Edit & Create: Produce original Instagram Reels and TikToks — cinematic, atmospheric visuals, mythology, history, modern. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Music-Sync Editing: Sometimes, your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional. Music is a storytelling weapon, not background noise.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated goddess characters into edits/videos. She's the visual anchor — the face the eye locks onto while mythology and editing layers move around her. You'll make her feel like she belongs in the scene, not pasted on top of it.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll learn to create them. We provide paid accounts for frontier AI tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream5, and whatever launches next). You'll generate AI influencer visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits/videos. Prior AI experience is a plus, not a requirement — we train the right editor.



Platform Instinct: You understand what gets saved on Instagram. What gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, we expect high output. You'll ramp up from 3-5 pieces per week to 10-15 at steady state.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



The Aesthetic Eye. This is non-negotiable. Your portfolio should make us stop scrolling. If your work already lives in the neighborhood of cinematic, aspirational — we want to talk.



Creative Instinct. You don't wait to be told what to make. Given a goddess/character, a mood, and a piece of music, you see the edit before you open the timeline. You pitch ideas, not just execute briefs. Storytelling comes naturally — you think in narrative beats, not just cuts.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever the genre. You understand pacing as a weapon.



Premiere Pro. Your primary editing tool. You're fast, clean, and comfortable working in shared project structures.



Loop Thinking. You design edits/videos that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional. This matters as much as your editing. Responsiveness and clarity are non-negotiable.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice — And They Affect Your Rate)



- After Effects — compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is how AI-generated visuals get integrated into polished edits. Strong AE skills will place you at the higher end of our compensation range.

- AI generation experience — Kling3.0, Veo3.1, Comfyui, Seedance2.0, Seedream5.0 or similar. If you already know these tools, your rate reflects it. If not, we provide paid accounts and training.

- Color grading — pushing mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media (sometimes YouTube as well). Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run Premiere Pro and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a paid trial. We provide real assets, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content.



Trial is compensated at $150 USD at the end of each week. For select candidates, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 USD for a single deliverable.



If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, you transition to confirmed status with bi-weekly payments at your assessed rate — paid before work. Prepayment is earned through the trial, not given on day one.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — we provide the tools, you bring the talent

- AI training — you'll learn to generate content with cutting-edge tools as part of your workflow, even if you've never touched them before

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- Rate growth — your compensation grows as your capabilities do. We invest in editors who invest in the work.

- A brand worth building — you're not joining a finished machine, you're helping build one. We're looking for long-term commitment.



---



COMPENSATION



$800–1,000 USD/month based on experience. Editors with stronger technical skills (After Effects, AI generation) start at the higher end. We assess your rate based on your portfolio, not your résumé.



After confirmed hire: bi-weekly payments, paid before work.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA EDITOR — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. Your Best Work. Link to ONE video that showcases your creativity, editing execution, and aesthetic taste. This should be the piece you're most proud of — the one that makes people stop scrolling.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Luxury Test. In 3-5 bullets, how do you make an edit feel "expensive" instead of "cheap"?



4. The Creative Instinct Test (3-5 sentences). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established editing template — how long would a 15-20 second piece take you? How long would a 45 second Cinematic AI video take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."



Looking forward to meeting and working with you!

title: Data Logger - Video Game Sales Company
description:
We are hiring someone to review recorded livestream footage and log sales for a high-volume retro video game business. You will watch livestream recordings and document each item sold, including details like price, condition, color, and item type. This role requires excellent English comprehension, strong attention to detail, and a deep understanding of video games and gaming consoles.



Responsibilities:

Review 8–12 hours of livestream footage each day. Identify every item sold during the stream and log the sale. Record details such as item name, console or system, game title or accessory type, color variant, condition, sale price, and any relevant notes. You will be responsible for logging between 500 and 1000 sales per day. All data must be organized clearly and entered accurately into a spreadsheet or database.



Requirements:

Expert-level English comprehension is required because you must understand fast spoken English during livestreams. Strong knowledge of video games and consoles is required, including Nintendo, PlayStation, Xbox, and retro systems. You must be familiar with games, controllers, consoles, and accessories. This role requires excellent attention to detail, strong focus while watching long video recordings, and the ability to handle a high-responsibility role with accuracy and consistency.



Ideal Candidate:

The ideal candidate is passionate about video games, organized, consistent, and comfortable with repetitive but detail-focused work. You must take accuracy and responsibility seriously.



How to Apply:

Please include your experience with video games or gaming hardware, your favorite gaming console, and a short explanation of why you think you would be a good fit for this role. Applications without these answers may not be considered.

title: AI Content Automation Architect (Video, E-commerce, Social Pipelines)
description:
Overview:

Metaone Group is a high-speed, fully remote AI-First Automation Agency and Media Company. We do not do things manually. We build machines. We are currently building a fully automated "Content Factory" to mass-produce digital media, and we need a highly technical AI Content Automation Architect to build the pipelines.



If you know how to connect AI scriptwriters to AI video generators, and automatically route that content to social media and e-commerce platforms, we want you on our team.



The Role:

You will be the core technical builder of our AI media pipelines. Your goal is to make AI do 90% of the work. You will use custom scripts, APIs, and automation platforms to chain together AI tools so they automatically generate and publish high-volume content for our internal brands and external clients.



Key Responsibilities:



AI Short Drama & Video Pipelines: Build automated workflows that take a text prompt/script and run it through AI voiceover (ElevenLabs, etc.) and AI video/image generators (Midjourney, Runway, HeyGen, Jimeng) to assemble short-form video content.



E-commerce Automation: Create pipelines that automatically generate product descriptions, marketing copy, and AI-enhanced product images, pushing them directly into our e-commerce campaigns.



Day-to-Day Social Media Autopilot: Build automated systems that generate daily social media posts (copy + visuals) for multiple companies and automatically schedule/post them across different platforms.



API Chaining & Integration: Connect large language models (like ChatGPT/Claude) with media generation APIs and our enterprise workspace (Lark).



System Architecture: Map out the technical blueprint of these workflows so our creative team (Prompt Engineers) can easily plug their ideas into your automated machine.



Requirements:



Proven experience building complex automations (
, Zapier, or custom Python/Node.js scripts).



Deep understanding of API integrations, specifically working with AI image, video, and text generation endpoints.



Experience with auto-posting tools and social media APIs (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.).



A proactive "builder" mindset—you don't wait for a tutorial; you figure out how to automate the workflow.



Excellent English communication skills (written and video).

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
ABOUT US



Commoner Apps is a boutique mobile and web development company based in Texas, USA. We build Trackara — a multi-tier automotive platform serving car enthusiasts, mobile mechanics, and auto repair shops.



Trackara is a beautifully designed app for car enthusiasts to track maintenance, mods, and vehicle history. Trackara Pro is a powerful business platform built for mobile mechanics to manage clients, jobs, and invoicing on the go.





THE ROLE



We're looking for a creative and driven Social Media Marketer to build and grow our brand presence across multiple platforms. You'll be responsible for creating engaging content, growing our audience of car enthusiasts and mobile mechanics, and driving awareness for both Trackara and Trackara Pro.



This is a part-time, remote position — perfect for someone who loves cars and social media and wants to be part of a growing startup from the ground floor.





PLATFORMS YOU'LL MANAGE



- YouTube — Long-form and Shorts content, tutorials, product demos, and automotive culture videos

- TikTok — Short-form viral content, trending audio, car culture and behind-the-scenes clips

- Instagram — Reels, Stories, feed posts, and community engagement

-
 — Page management, community building, and group engagement

- LinkedIn — Professional brand presence, thought leadership, and B2B content for Trackara Pro





WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Create, schedule, and publish content across all five platforms on a consistent cadence

- Develop a content calendar aligned with product launches, automotive events, and trending topics

- Write compelling captions, scripts, and copy tailored to each platform's audience

- Engage with followers, respond to comments and DMs, and grow community interaction

- Track analytics and report on key metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, conversions)

- Collaborate with the founder on brand voice, campaign ideas, and growth strategy

- Stay current on social media trends, algorithm changes, and automotive community culture

- Follow and apply our established brand kit (fonts, colors, logos, tone) consistently across all platforms





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Experience managing social media accounts (personal or professional) with demonstrable growth

- Strong understanding of YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, and LinkedIn best practices

- Ability to create engaging short-form video content (filming and basic editing skills a plus)

- Excellent written communication — you can write punchy captions and longer-form copy

- Interest in or knowledge of the automotive space (car culture, mechanics, restoration, etc.)

- Self-starter who can work independently and manage their own schedule

- Experience with Buffer for content scheduling (this is what we use)

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or similar) are a plus — we provide a full brand kit with style guidelines, fonts, colors, and logos





WHY JOIN COMMONER APPS?



- Get in on the ground floor of a growing automotive tech brand

- Creative freedom — your ideas will directly shape our brand voice and presence

- Work alongside a passionate founder who lives and breathes cars and technology

- Flexible schedule that fits around your life

- Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the company scales

title: AI Content Production Specialist (Video, Canva & ChatGPT)
description:
Overview:

Metaone Group is a fast-growing, fully remote AI-First Automation Agency and Media Company. We are building a high-speed "Content Factory" to mass-produce social media content, e-commerce assets, and short AI videos.



We are looking for an AI Content Production Specialist to join our creative engine. If you have solid design and video editing skills, a highly trainable mindset, and a passion for learning how to use AI tools (like Midjourney, Canva AI, and ChatGPT) to create content at scale, we want you on our team.



The Role:

You will be the hands-on creator for our digital media pipelines. Instead of designing one post from scratch, you will learn to use "modular prompts" to generate batches of videos, images, and marketing copy. You will take raw AI generations and polish them into final, brand-ready assets for our global campaigns (including AI short dramas and e-commerce).



Key Responsibilities:



AI Content Generation: Use tools like ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Jimeng (we will train you on our exact workflows) to generate high volumes of images and video clips.



Graphic Design & Assembly: Use Canva to format AI-generated images into clean, consistent social media posts and e-commerce product graphics.

Requirements:

Good English communication skills.



Ability to work standard Philippine daytime hours.

title: Bookkeeping, Accounts Payable, Revenue Reconciliation
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & QuickBooks

Record financial transactions in QuickBooks

Maintain accurate general ledger entries

Match bank and credit card transactions to the correct expenses

Ensure all transactions are categorized correctly

Maintain organized digital records of receipts and invoices

Assist with monthly bookkeeping and financial organization



Accounts Payable (AP)



Enter vendor invoices into QuickBooks

Verify invoice accuracy and supporting documentation

Track invoice due dates and maintain an organized payable schedule

Ensure expenses are coded correctly by category and property

Identify potential duplicate invoices or payments before processing



Accounts Receivable (AR)



Record incoming payments and deposits

Ensure deposits are recorded correctly in QuickBooks

Track outstanding balances when applicable

Apply payments to the correct accounts



Hotel Revenue Reconciliation



Reconcile daily hotel revenue reports against deposits

Verify that reported revenue matches deposits in bank accounts

Review credit card batches, OTA payments, and merchant deposits

Identify discrepancies between reported revenue and deposits

Flag missing or incorrect deposits for review



Bank & Transaction Reconciliation



Match bank and credit card transactions to recorded expenses

Reconcile bank accounts and financial statements

Investigate discrepancies or missing transactions

Ensure all financial activity is accurately recorded



Vendor Invoice Review



Review vendor invoices for accuracy before entry

Identify duplicate invoices or duplicate payment risks

Maintain organized vendor records

Flag unusual vendor charges or inconsistencies



Expense Monitoring



Review expenses for unusual increases or inconsistencies

Flag unexpected spikes in categories such as utilities, maintenance, or vendor costs

Compare expenses against historical spending patterns



Monthly Property Financial Summary

Prepare a simple monthly financial summary for each property including:



Total revenue

Total expenses

Estimated NOI

Deposit discrepancies

Unusual expenses or vendor payments

Notes on financial inconsistencies or items requiring review



Required Skills



Strong experience using QuickBooks

Excellent numerical and analytical ability

Extremely detail-oriented

Strong organizational skills

Ability to reconcile financial data accurately

Ability to identify discrepancies in financial records

Ability to work independently and follow structured processes

Strong spreadsheet skills (Excel or Google Sheets)



Preferred Experience



Bookkeeping or accounting support experience

Experience with hotel or hospitality accounting

Experience reconciling daily revenue or financial reports

Familiarity with financial reconciliation processes



Ideal Candidate



Highly disciplined with numbers and financial data

Notices small discrepancies others miss

Organized and methodical with financial records

Reliable and consistent with data accuracy

Comfortable working independently with financial systems

title: Real Estate Video/Photograpy Editor
description:
About Us

Bolder Digital is an Australian-based recruitment agency committed to connecting top Filipino talent with leading businesses globally. We are looking for an individual to join our team and work remotely from the Philippines as we are based in Australia (Remote, based in the Philippines, working on Australian Eastern Time Zone 8/9 AM – 5 PM).

ASAP

Negotiable — based on proven expertise



Overview

We are hiring an elite Video Editor with advanced, professional-level experience in real estate, construction, architecture, and promotional brand content.



This role requires someone who has spent years working in high-pressure commercial environments — someone who understands tight turnarounds, precision editing, narrative flow, and the visual standards required in premium marketing.



You’ll be working across:

High-end real estate property videos

Builder & construction showcases

Architectural features & design storytelling

Promotional brand edits for businesses

If you don’t have industry-proven commercial experience, don’t apply.

If you do — we want you.



Key Responsibilities

Real Estate, Construction & Promo Editing

Edit cinematic, high-impact property videos showcasing interiors, exteriors, lifestyle elements, architecture, and land features

Build fast-turnaround construction progress videos, promo reels, project showcases, and brand storytelling pieces

Craft engaging short-form edits for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts using clean pacing, crisp sound design, and strong narrative structure

Masterfully repurpose long-form shoots into multiple content deliverables

Apply brand identity, graphics, typography, colour grading, and transitions with consistency and precision

Creative Execution & Collaboration

Work from raw media and briefs to produce polished, broadcast-level edits

Take constructive criticism without ego — improve, iterate, and refine

Work efficiently under pressure, meeting tight deadlines and high-volume demands

Communicate clearly with our internal team and clients across review cycles



Optional but Preferred

Photo editing experience in Photoshop & Lightroom

Ability to design static promotional assets (carousels, quotes, graphic posts)

Strong understanding of brand identity and visual strategy



Portfolio Requirements

Submit 10–15 examples of:

Real estate, construction, or architectural video edits

Promotional commercial edits

Short-form vertical content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

(Optional) Static design work

For each item, include your typical editing timeframe (e.g. “average time to edit a 2-minute real estate showcase” or “average time for a 30-second promo reel”).

Applicants who cannot provide a portfolio at this level will not be considered.



Requirements

Expert-level skill in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. (Final Cut or DaVinci Resolve acceptable for masters only.)

Minimum 3–5+ years professional experience in real estate/construction/promotional editing

Strong understanding of modern pacing, visual hooks, retention strategy, and commercial storytelling

Ability to work fast without compromising quality

Willingness to learn, grow, adapt — no ego

Availability during Australian Eastern Time working hours

Reliable internet + hardware capable of smooth high-res workflows



Additional Preferences

Strong colour grading ability

Understanding of real estate marketing strategy

Familiarity with aerial/drone workflow

Ability to contribute ideas to improve visual strategy



Benefits

Competitive pay based on expertise

Flexible working structure

Long-term, consistent work

High-level creative environment with room to grow



How to Apply

Submit:

Resume

Short cover letter

A portfolio with required samples

Your average editing times per content type

Use the application code VIDDY so we know you’ve read the full role description.



IMPORTANT: This is an expert-only position. You will be skills-tested.

If you’re not proven, not fast, or not world-class — this isn’t for you.

description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a creative, strategic, and "design-first" Marketing Coordinator to lead the digital presence of two social care organisations: a boutique residential care home group and a specialist complex homecare provider based in the UK.



You will be the "Brand Guardian," responsible for ensuring our services look premium, feel trustworthy, and generate consistent private-pay enquiries. This is a hands-on role where you will design brochures, manage websites, rank us on Google, and tell the stories of our residents and staff.



Key Responsibilities

1. Brand & Creative Design

Visual Identity: Manage and evolve the visual branding for both companies across all touchpoints (brochures, signage, digital assets).



Graphic Design: Use Canva (or Adobe Suite) to create high-end marketing collateral that appeals to self-funding families and clinical case managers.



Content Production: Transform raw photos/videos from our UK teams into engaging social media content and high-quality video clips.



2. Digital Growth & SEO

Search Dominance: Manage and optimize Google Business Profiles for multiple locations to ensure we rank #1 in local searches.



SEO & Website: Maintain and update our WordPress websites. Write SEO-optimized blogs that position us as thought leaders in complex care and dementia.



Paid Ads: Execute and monitor Meta and Google Ad campaigns when required to boost occupancy.



3. Reputation & Trust

Review Management: Monitor and respond professionally to reviews on Google and 
 to build "Social Proof."



Persuasive Copywriting: Write "Life Story" features, newsletters, and website copy that balances clinical excellence with emotional warmth.



4. Lead Generation

Inbound Strategy: Implement organic strategies to turn website visitors into phone enquiries.



Market Positioning: Ensure our "Boutique" status is reflected in every digital post, differentiating us from large corporate competitors.



Requirements & Skills

Experience: 3+ years in a multi-channel marketing role (Healthcare or Real Estate experience is a huge plus).



Exceptional taste in design and a portfolio that proves you can create premium, clean, and modern layouts.



Tech Stack: Proficiency in Canva, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, WordPress, and Video Editing (CapCut/Premiere).



Language: Good written English with a talent for persuasive, empathetic storytelling.



SEO Savvy: A solid understanding of local SEO and how to rank a service-based business.



AI Proficiency: Ability to use AI tools (Gemini, Nanobanana ) to accelerate content creation without losing the "human touch."

Ability to work during UK business hours (GMT 09:00 - 17:00) Mon - Friday



How to Apply (3-Step Process)

To be considered for this role, you must complete the following three steps:



Your CV: Attach your latest CV highlighting relevant service-based marketing experience.



Introduction Video: Record a short 2-minute video introducing yourself. We want to see your personality, your communication style, and why you think you’re a great fit.



The Proposal: Find us online (JT Carehomes). Review our current website and social media presence. Provide a short PDF or slide deck (max 3-5 pages) showing:



What you would change immediately to make us look more "Premium/Boutique."



A mood board or mockup of what our Instagram/Facebook grid should look like.



One SEO or ranking "quick win" you would implement for our Google Business Profile.



Please send the above to

title: Image Processing Assistant – Resize and Format Travel Photos for Website
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Image Formatting Assistant to prepare travel photos for use on a website.



Another researcher will first collect high-quality images and organize them into folders. Your job will be to take those images and process them into a consistent format that is ready to be used on the website.



This role focuses on cropping, resizing, and exporting images so they all follow the same visual standard.



The work is structured and repetitive, so attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully is important.

You should be comfortable using image editing software such as Photoshop, Affinity Photo, GIMP, or similar tools.



Responsibilities



Your main responsibilities will include:



• Open raw images provided by our research assistant

• Crop images to highlight the main subject or landscape

• Resize images to a fixed website canvas size

• Export images in a consistent high-quality format

• Save the processed images into the correct folders



The goal is to create clean, consistent, website-ready images.



Image Processing Requirements



All images must follow these formatting rules.



Canvas Size

All final images must be resized to:

2560 × 1440 pixels (16:9 landscape format)

Images should be cropped to fit this canvas without stretching or distortion.



Image Quality



Images should be exported as:

• JPEG format

• High quality 

• sRGB color profile

Images must remain sharp and visually clean, while still being optimized for website performance.



Cropping Guidelines



When cropping images, focus on:



• the main landscape or scenery

• the destination or activity

• balanced composition



Avoid awkward crops that remove important parts of the scene.



File Naming Format



Images must maintain this format:



location_name_01.jpg

location_name_02.jpg

location_name_03.jpg



Examples:



tulum_ruins_01.jpg

akumal_bay_01.jpg

cenote_dos_ojos_01.jpg



Use underscores instead of spaces.



Folder Structure



Processed images will be saved in organized folders such as:



• Beaches & Snorkelling

• Cenotes

• Mayan Ruins

• Scuba Diving

• Parks & Nature



Each destination will have its own folder.



Quality Expectations



Processed images must be:



• properly cropped

• consistently sized

• clearly named

• saved in the correct folder



Attention to detail is extremely important for this role.



Project Scope



This project will involve preparing images for 100+ travel destinations.

Each destination will typically require 5–10 final formatted images.

If the work quality is good, additional similar work may be available.



raw images will appear in this folder - 





processed images will go here -

title: Email Marketing & Klaviyo Specialist — Performance-Based
description:
Email Marketing & Klaviyo Specialist 

Scope: 5 e-commerce stores · ~$1M/month combined revenue



About the Role

We operate a portfolio of 5 e-commerce stores generating over $1M/month in combined revenue. We're looking for a hands-on Klaviyo specialist who owns
 end-to-end — from building flows to managing campaigns — and gets rewarded directly for what they deliver. This is a performance-based role: your earnings grow as results grow.



What You'll Own

Build and optimize core Klaviyo flows (Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Browse Abandonment, Post-Purchase, Win-Back, Sunset). Plan, write, and deploy weekly/bi-weekly campaigns across all 5 stores. Manage segmentation strategy to maximize deliverability and relevance. Run A/B tests on subject lines, send times, CTAs, and content. Monitor and report on key metrics: open rate, CTR, CVR, revenue per
, and list health. Maintain list hygiene and ensure compliance (CAN-SPAM / GDPR). Coordinate with the creative/copy team or produce copy independently.



What We're Looking For

2+ years of hands-on Klaviyo experience (mandatory). Proven track record managing
 for DTC/e-commerce brands. Solid understanding of
 deliverability best practices. Ability to manage multiple brands simultaneously. Data-driven mindset — you make decisions from the numbers. Strong written English; bonus if you can write compelling

Nice to Have

Experience with Shopify integrations. Basic HTML/CSS for
 templates. Knowledge of SMS marketing (Klaviyo or Postscript). Experience managing brands across different niches.



How to Apply

Only applicants with verifiable Klaviyo experience will be considered.

Eviction Execution: Utilizing the Evictions Tool and Phone Broadcast System for automated notifications.

Delinquency & Collection Updates: Directly contacting tenants on the "past due" list and updating owners.

Lease Renewal Follow-up: Contacting tenants whose leases are expiring to confirm renewals.

Court Prep Checklist: Compiling and verifying the legal file for the OM’s court date.

Property Condition Reports: Compiling a monthly summary of deferred maintenance for owner review.

Owner’s Preventive Maintenance Newsletter: Drafting monthly updates highlighting seasonal care and upcoming projects.

Pre-Certification "Rent Check" Inspections: Conducting targeted inspections based on municipal certificate requirements.

description:

Supportive and professional team environment

title: VIDEO EDITOR  DIGITAL-FIRST REAL ESTATE (AI + REAL FOOTAGE HYBRID)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable video editor who can blend real estate footage with modern AI tools without sacrificing authenticity.



This is not a generic editing role. Our content must feel authoritative, sharp, and real while using AI strategically to enhance storytelling.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You will be editing short-form property and brand content for a fast-growing digital-first real estate business. The goal is simple: create clean, high-impact videos that build trust with buyers, vendors, and investors.



You must know how to use AI as a tool, not as a crutch.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

• Edit short-form vertical videos for Meta, TikTok, Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts

• Work with real phone footage, drone clips and walk-through visuals

• Use Nano Banana Pro (or similar) for image enhancement and visual polishing

• Use Kling AI (or similar) for motion effects, hooks and transitions

• Maintain a “real-first, cinematic-second” editing style

• Deliver fast turnaround with consistent visual standards



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• Strong experience editing real estate, property or authority-based content

• Understanding of short-form attention hooks (first 3 seconds matter)

• Ability to enhance footage without making it look artificial

• Clean typography, modern pacing, confident visual storytelling

• Experience with AI video tools is essential



IMPORTANT OUR STYLE

We are NOT looking for overly animated or fake-looking edits.



Most of the video must be grounded in real footage. AI visuals are used only to:

• create strong opening hooks

• add cinematic transitions

• enhance suburb or map visuals

• elevate branding 
nts



If your work looks like generic AI ads, this role is not for you.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Videos feel premium but authentic

• Authority and trust come first

• Consistent editing style across multiple property campaigns

• Fast, reliable delivery without constant revisions



Include your WhatsApp number below, shortlisted applicants will receive a direct message with further details.

 & Instagram) video ads for lead generation.

Meta video ads 
 & Instagram)

Strategic, conversion-focused messaging

 for feedback and revisions

title: Instagram DM Sales Closer (Christian Apparel Brand)
description:
Love of God is a rapidly growing Christian clothing brand built on impact, excellence, and authenticity. We’re not just selling apparel — we’re building a movement rooted in faith, depth, and real connection.



We’re looking for a high-performing DM Sales Closer who knows how to build genuine relationships through Instagram and
 messaging — and turn conversations into customers.



This is not entry-level support.



This is relationship-driven sales.



The Role



You will manage conversations through Instagram and
 
 using Meta Business Suite.



Your mission:



• Build trust

• Create real connection

• Handle objections confidently

• Guide conversations toward a natural close



This starts as a part-time position (10–20 hours per week) with room to grow as revenue scales.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



• Responding quickly and professionally to inbound DMs

• Starting conversations with warm followers when appropriate

• Building genuine rapport (no robotic copy-paste responses)

• Answering product questions clearly and confidently

• Handling objections like “It’s too expensive” or “I’ll think about it”

• Following up with warm leads who haven’t purchased

• Tracking conversations and sales generated

• Increasing overall DM conversion rates



Requirements



You must have:



• Excellent written English (natural, conversational tone)

• Proven sales experience (chat or call closing preferred)

• Customer support experience

• Strong emotional intelligence

• Confidence in persuasion without being aggressive

• Reliable internet connection

• Availability that overlaps with U.S. daytime hours



Bonus points if you:



• Have worked with eCommerce brands

• Understand Instagram culture and buyer psychology

• Have experience inside Meta Business Suite

• Have worked in commission-based roles



Compensation



This is a performance-based role.



• Base Pay: $1–$4 per hour (based on experience)

• Commission: 5-8% of sales generated from your tracked conversations



We average $400 a day revenue in sales from ads alone.



Hours will begin at 10–20 per week and expand as traffic and sales grow.



High performers will earn increased commission and expanded responsibility.



Growth Path



Top performers can grow into:



• Lead DM Closer

• Sales Team Manager

• Community Growth Lead



We reward performance — not tenure.



How to Apply



Please answer the following:



What sales experience do you have?



Have you ever closed a sale through chat? Describe your process.



How would you respond to:

• “I love it, but it’s too expensive.”

• “I’ll think about it.”

title: Credit Repair Dispute Specialist (Experienced Only)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based credit repair company seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Credit Repair Dispute Specialist to join our team. This role involves analyzing credit reports, identifying inaccurate or negative items, and preparing dispute letters to the credit bureaus. The ideal candidate has prior experience in credit repair and understands the dispute process.



The Dispute Specialist will be responsible for managing client files, ensuring disputes are sent in a timely manner, and maintaining accurate records in our credit repair software.



Key Responsibilities:



Review and analyze client credit reports from the three major credit bureaus



Identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable negative items



Prepare and send dispute letters to credit bureaus and creditors



Update client files and maintain detailed notes in the system



Ensure first dispute rounds are sent within 3 business days of client onboarding

title: inside sales representative
description:
Job Title: Inside Sales Representative (Dental Industry) – Go High Level Experience Required

Location: Remote / Hybrid (depending on company)

Department: Sales / Patient Acquisition

Reports To: Sales Manager / Practice Growth Manager



Position Overview



We are seeking a highly responsive and results-driven Inside Sales Representative to manage and convert inbound leads for our growing dental organization. This role requires daily use of Go High Level (GHL) to manage, track, and respond to leads across multiple channels including phone calls, text messages, web forms, and social media inquiries.



Speed and professionalism are critical. The ideal candidate will respond to new leads within minutes, build rapport with potential patients, and guide them toward booking appointments. This role is heavily performance-driven and requires consistent tracking of conversion metrics.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Management & Response



Monitor and respond to inbound leads from phone, text, website forms, and social media platforms.



Use Go High Level (GHL) as the primary CRM to manage conversations and track lead activity.



Respond to new inquiries quickly (ideally within 5 minutes) to maximize conversion opportunities.



Engage potential patients via phone, SMS, and messaging to answer questions and build trust.



Appointment Conversion



Qualify leads and guide them toward booking consultations or treatment appointments.



Handle objections and provide clear explanations of dental services and next steps.



Follow up persistently with warm leads who have not yet scheduled.



CRM & Data Tracking



Maintain accurate records in Go High Level including lead status, notes, and communication history.



Track and report key performance metrics including:



Lead response time



Contact rate



Appointment booking rate



Show rate



Conversion rate



Ensure leads are properly categorized and moved through the pipeline.



Follow-Up & Nurture



Execute automated and manual follow-up campaigns within GHL.



Re-engage older leads who have not converted.



Support ongoing patient acquisition campaigns.



Required Qualifications



Experience using Go High Level (GHL) CRM is required.



2+ years experience in inside sales, lead conversion, or appointment setting.



Experience responding to high-volume inbound leads.



Strong phone presence and communication skills.



Ability to respond quickly and manage multiple conversations simultaneously.



Comfortable working with sales KPIs and performance metrics.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in the dental, healthcare, or cosmetic services industry.



Familiarity with social media lead conversations 
, Instagram, etc.).



Experience with text-based selling and appointment setting.



Understanding of patient financing or treatment consultations.



Key Skills



Rapid lead response



Persuasive communication



CRM management (Go High Level)



Objection handling



Time management



Data tracking and reporting



Performance Metrics



Success in this role will be measured by:



Average lead response time



Leads contacted



Appointments booked



Appointment show rate



Revenue generated from booked consultations

title: Duda Dynamic Pages Setup + 1 Dynamic Template (Lead Generation Website)
description:
Project Description

I am building a lead generation / rank-and-rent website for service contractors using Duda.

Examples of contractor niches this structure will support:

mold remediation





pool contractors





concrete contractors





foundation repair





roofing





other home service contractors





This project is Phase 1 of a larger project.

If the work is done well, I will immediately hire you for Phase 2 to complete the rest of the templates and demo pages.



Important: This Project Uses Duda Dynamic Pages

This project must use:

Duda Dynamic Pages / Collections

Please do not build static pages only.

The goal is to create a dynamic template system that can later scale to many pages.



Phase 1 Scope of Work

This phase is intentionally small.

You only need to complete two tasks.



Task 1 — Create a Duda Collection

Create a dynamic collection (database) in Duda.

Example fields may include:

city





state





service





problem





option_a





option_b





section_heading





section_content





Add 3–5 sample rows so the dynamic template can display content.

Placeholder data is fine.



Task 2 — Create ONE Dynamic Page Template

Create one dynamic page template connected to the collection.

Template type:

Service Page Template

Suggested structure:

Section 1 — Hero

 Section 2 — Intro

 Section 3 — Service Process

 Section 4 — Local Expertise

 Section 5 — CTA

Each section should include:

heading





subheading





paragraph text





optional button





Use dynamic fields where possible.

Example:

{{service}} in {{city}}, {{state}}



Design Direction

This is a lead generation website for contractor services.

The design should be:

simple





clean





conversion-focused





professional





mobile responsive





This is not a complex design project.

Focus on:

clean layout





clear CTAs





usability







Phase 1 Deliverables

Please provide:

• Duda collection created

 • sample rows added

 • 1 dynamic page template connected to the collection

 • responsive layout

 • clean structure



What Is NOT Required

To keep Phase 1 simple:

You do not need to provide:

final copywriting





SEO optimization





advanced design





animations





integrations







Timeline

Phase 1 should take about:

1 day



Important (Application Instructions)

Please start your proposal with:

DYNAMIC DUDA

Then answer these three questions:

Have you built Duda Dynamic Pages using Collections before?

What would be your first step when creating a dynamic template structure in Duda?

Please include one screenshot of a Duda project you have worked on.







If Phase 1 Goes Well

If the work is good, I will immediately continue with Phase 2.

Phase 2 will include building the remaining templates and demo website.

title: Video Editor/Image Editor to make creatives
description:
Dear,



For our fast-growing e-commerce brand, we are on track to hit 8 figures this year. Therefore, we are looking for a high-level Video Editor / Image Editor with proven experience producing high-converting ad creatives for major e-commerce brands to become a core part of our creatives team.



We are not looking for beginner editors or basic freelancers. We are looking for someone who understands performance marketing, direct response advertising, and how to create creatives that actually generate revenue at scale.



You must be extremely creative, fast, detail-oriented, and performance-focused when producing content.



To prove you have read this carefully, please apply with the word cranberry before you introduce yourself.



Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we require for this job.



Please answer the following questions if you are interested:



Do you have experience creating direct response ad creatives for e-commerce brands?



Have you worked with 6–7–8 figure Shopify brands before?



Can you provide examples of ads you edited that performed well in paid advertising campaigns?



Which software do you primarily use for editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, etc.)?



Are you comfortable producing multiple creative variations for testing and scaling ads?



Do you understand UGC ad structure, hooks, retention editing, and conversion-focused creatives?



Are you available full-time, 6–7 days a week, and responsive during business hours?



As a Video Editor / Image Editor you must have:



Proven experience creating high-converting ad creatives for e-commerce brands (Must)



Strong video editing skills using Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent software (Must)



Strong image editing and graphic design skills using Photoshop or equivalent tools (Must)



Deep understanding of direct response marketing and performance creatives (Must)



Ability to create multiple ad variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns (Must)



Ability to edit UGC style ads, product ads, and paid social creatives (Must)



Strong sense of hook creation, pacing, retention editing, and storytelling (Must)



Highly responsive, professional, and able to work in a fast-paced environment (Must)



Prior experience working with 7-figure brands or marketing agencies (Pre)



If you do not meet the requirements, please do not apply. (thank you)



Your duties will be:



Editing high-converting video ads for platforms such as
 and Instagram



Creating image creatives for paid advertising campaigns



Producing multiple creative variations for testing and scaling campaigns



Implementing hooks, captions, motion graphics, and retention-based editing



Following creative briefs and marketing strategies provided by the team



Collaborating with the marketing team to develop new creative angles and concepts



Organizing and maintaining creative files and workflows



Delivering creatives quickly and consistently to support advertising campaigns



Ensuring all creatives meet brand standards and performance goals



FULL SOPs AND CREATIVE REFERENCES PROVIDED



ROOM TO GROW INTO A SENIOR CREATIVE / CREATIVE DIRECTOR ROLE



FAST-PACED TEAM BUILDING AN 8-FIGURE BRAND



If you believe you are the right fit for this role and can produce world-class creatives that drive real revenue, please respond to this post.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: Operations Virtual Assistant (Content Repurposing + Outreach + Brand Systems)| 20 HOURS/WEEK
description:
I’m Kimberly Strickland, an author and speaker building a growing brand around my upcoming book. I’m hiring a Virtual Assistant who thinks in operations: someone who can take high-level ideas and turn them into repeatable workflows, execute consistently, track progress, and help improve the system over time.



This is a long-term role for someone who communicates clearly, follows systems, takes ownership, and is willing to grow with the brand as responsibilities increase.



If you do not include the Required Proof Packet, I will not review your application.



Month 1 outcomes you will own

  - Domain + funnel setup

   -Connect my domain to 
 (DNS updates, redirects, troubleshooting)

   -Ensure links work properly and consistently

   -Brand consistency across platforms

   -Update social profiles with consistent branding and messaging

   -Align tone by platform:

   -YouTube = new audience growth through consistent publishing and clean edits

   -Pinterest = discovery traffic and book promotion graphics

   -LinkedIn = local Tampa presence and relationship nurturing

   -Instagram,
, TikTok = repurposed content for consistency, not the main growth engine



 marketing foundation

   Set up ConvertKit

   Build a basic newsletter workflow to nurture signups and book interest

   Weekly core priorities (recurring every week)



Content repurposing and consistency

   - YouTube: assist with publishing and basic long-form editing (clean cuts, quick transitions, consistent formatting, clear audio)

   - Shorts: create Shorts from long-form using tools I already have (OpusClip + Captions)

   - Repurpose: schedule content across platforms (IG, FB, TikTok, LinkedIn) using a consistent system

   - Pinterest: create and schedule simple book-related graphics and pins



Editing style

Clean, compelling, simple. No overproduction. No distracting effects. The focus is my communication.



Outreach and relationship operations (ongoing)

   - Build a podcast outreach pipeline: research, list-building, outreach, follow-up, booking coordination

   - Track local connections and follow-up tasks from people I meet in person

   - Outreach to book signing opportunities, bookstores, venues, author networks when needed

   - Maintain trackers so nothing falls through



Operations and workflow expectations

This role is Level 2 operations:

   - You help turn ideas into workflows

   - You execute the workflows

   - You help adjust and improve them based on what we learn



I will share resources and direction. We will collaborate to extract what matters and will be the most effective, then I need you to implement.



Example: If I send you free resources from YouTube Formula, you create a 30-day implementation plan, then we simplify it into weekly actions.



Tools:

   - Canva

   - YouTube Studio

   - OpusClip + Captions

   - Google Drive + Google Sheets

   - Trello (preferred for my personal task visibility I need for my action items)



Note: I prefer daily text check-ins and weekly live checkins.



Communication

   Daily check-in via message

   Weekly real-time meeting (30 minutes)

   Async work is fine as long as deadlines are met



Pay

   20 hours/week

   $400 to $500/month to start (increases as the business grows)

*Please include your expected monthly rate for 20 hours/week.*



*PROOF PACKET - QUESTIONS* To apply:

1. Put WILDERNESS at the top of your application and answer:

2. Your timezone and availability for 20 hours/week

3. Your operations experience: describe how you turn ideas into workflows and execute them

4. Your experience with outreach pipelines (podcasts, partnerships, bookings, follow-ups) and how you track them

5. Your editing experience (tools you use, what clean long-form editing means to you)

6. Confirm you can handle weekly recurring work and shifting priorities without dropping the ball

7. Confirm you are interested in growing long-term with increasing responsibility



Required Proof Packet Portfolio:

To be considered, include the following. If you skip these, I will not review the application. Be sure to provide context and explanation. 



A) Operations tracker sample (required)

   -Share a screenshot or sample of a Google Sheet tracker you’ve used (or create a blank sample) for outreach or lead tracking

   -Must include: Contact/Lead, Platform, Status, Last Contact Date, Next Follow-Up Date, Notes, Outcome



B) Content proof (original work only)

   -1 YouTube long-form example you personally edited (link is fine, unlisted is fine)

   -Tell me exactly what you did on it

   -1–2 Shorts you personally produced from long-form



C) Branding proof

1 Canva sample (carousel, static post, thumbnail, or Pinterest pin)



D) Tech comfort (yes/no)

    Have you done DNS updates or domain connections before

    Have you worked inside 
 before

    Have you set up ConvertKit basics before



**Do not submit reposted clips from other creators as your work.



Skill Requirement (select on the platform)

   Virtual Assistant

   Canva

   Social Media Management

title: Case Manager / Operations Manager
description:
About Us

U.S. Direct Hire is a workforce solutions company connecting international talent with U.S. employers. We manage complex client cases involving multiple stakeholders and multi-step processes.



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive professional to manage complex cases, coordinate stakeholders, and help improve internal systems and workflows.



This role is ideal for someone with a paralegal, legal operations, or case management background who enjoys managing multi-step processes and building efficient systems.

Operations, Process Improvement & Admin Support

 management, document preparation, and basic bookkeeping/invoicing support

> Comfortable managing multiple projects/cases simultaneously



Preferred:

> Familiarity with case management systems or CRMs (Docketwise, Cerenade, etc.)

> Leadership potential with interest in helping build a team



Traits We Value:

> Detail-oriented and accountable

> Process-driven and systems-minded

> Proactive problem solver

> Strong ownership and ability to manage complex workflows



What We Offer:

How to Apply

 DISC Personality Test and take a screenshot of your pie chart results.
 the screenshot with your application (no need for the full report)

title: Digital Marketing & Social Media VA - Early-Stage SaaS Startup
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing AI-powered SaaS platform in the influencer marketing space. Our product helps brands score creators on fake followers, brand safety, and engagement quality before they commit budget. We launched recently and are growing fast. Our customers are brands and agencies that spend on influencer and creator partnerships.



We're a small, fast-moving team and this is a hands-on role where your work directly impacts growth. If you thrive in early-stage environments where you wear multiple hats and see the results of your efforts quickly, this is for you.



The Role



We're looking for a full-time Digital Marketing & Social Media VA to help us find, qualify, and reach potential customers, and keep our social media presence active and growing.



This is a split role: roughly half your time on lead research and prospecting, half on social media management and content. You'll work closely with the founder and have real ownership over these channels from day one.



What You'll Do



Lead Research & Prospecting (50%)



- Research brands actively working with influencers and creators across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

- Identify sponsored posts, gifted content, brand partnerships, and creator collaborations, logging the brands and creators you find in our internal system

- Qualify discovered brands against our target customer profile (DTC e-commerce, SaaS, subscription, health & wellness, beauty, fashion, food & beverage, and more)

- Find the right decision-maker at each qualified brand on LinkedIn (marketing managers, heads of marketing, founders, CMOs) and log their details in our system

- Send LinkedIn connection requests on behalf of tea
mbers using provided templates

- Engage with prospects' posts on LinkedIn (likes, thoughtful comments) to warm them up before outreach

- Help prepare and eventually send personalised outreach messages once connections are accepted

- Track and update prospect statuses as they move through the pipeline



Social Media & Content (50%)



- Manage and post to our 
pany page, repurposing blog content into native LinkedIn posts (3-4x per week)

- Manage our X/Twitter account, scheduling tweets, monitoring for replies and mentions, engaging with relevant conversations

- Monitor Reddit communities (r/influencermarketing, r/ecommerce, r/shopify and others) for relevant threads and flag them for the founder's personal response

- Compile a simple weekly report covering website traffic, social engagement,
 metrics, and pipeline progress

- Help maintain consistency across all social channels with brand voice and messaging



Who You Are



Must-haves:

- 3+ years of experience in digital marketing, social media management, or a related role

- Strong written and spoken English

- Experience with LinkedIn (posting, engagement, connection requests, prospecting)

- Comfortable with TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube - you can spot sponsored content and brand partnerships quickly

- Organised and detail-oriented - you'll be logging data across multiple systems daily

- Self-starter who can work independently without constant direction

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, early-stage startup environment where processes are still being built

- Available to overlap at least 4 hours with UK GMT/BST timezone



Nice-to-haves:

- Experience in influencer marketing, either agency-side, brand-side, or as a creator yourself

- Experience with outreach campaigns (LinkedIn,
, or both)

- Familiarity with DTC / e-commerce brands and the creator economy

- Experience with tools like Instantly, Apollo, or similar outreach platforms

- Basic understanding of SaaS products and subscription business models



Working Arrangements



- Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week), at least 4 hours daily overlap with UK GMT/BST required

- Compensation: $
/month USD, depending on experience

- Location: Remote, Philippines-based

- Start: As soon as possible

- Trial: 1-week paid trial to ensure mutual fit before committing



How to Apply



Send us a short message covering:



1. A brief intro - who you are and your relevant experience

2. Have you worked with influencer marketing, DTC brands, or creator partnerships before? If so, how?

3. Describe a time you had to research and qualify leads or prospects. What was your process?

4. What social media platforms are you most experienced with, and what kind of content have you managed?

5. Your expected monthly salary in USD



Please do not send a generic cover letter. We read every application and value specific, thoughtful responses over length.

title: Legal Assistant (Litigation)
description:
We are a busy US-based law firm looking for a sharp, reliable Legal Assistant to help manage our litigation cases. We handle high-stakes defense work, so we need someone who is professional, disciplined, and doesn't need their hand held.



Key Responsibilities:



Managing the calendar and deadlines is the most important part of this job.



You will handle all court scheduling and track statutes of limitations to ensure every case stays on track.



You will be the professional point of contact for our clients.



This includes giving regular case updates and gathering any documents we need.



For documentation you will draft legal letters and keep our digital case files organized.



You will also use Xero for basic financial tracking and billing tasks related to our active ? cases.



You will handle other administrative tasks as assigned by the team to support our operations.





Requirements:



We prefer candidates with at least 1 year of professional work experience.



?A background in law is very beneficial for this role (but not required)



?If you do not have a legal background you must be a very fast learner who can be trained in a short period.



?You must be extremely organized because missing a court date is not an option.



?Your English needs to be excellent for professional client communication.





Schedule:



(9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST)



How to Apply:



Answer this question along with your message: 



What do you think you will contribute in your first 30 days with us?



Add your resume



Add your portfolio (very beneficial but not required)



Voice recording 30-60 seconds voice recording of yourself introducing your relevant background and experience.



Thank you and good luck!

title: Executive Assistant to CEO, multi-location Spa in USA
description:
**Location:** Remote www.cloud9.spa

**Employment Type:** Full-Time

Must be dedicated, cannot accept other side jobs or projects, otherwise, please do not apply.



About Us:

We are a rapidly growing chain of family-friendly spas committed to exceptional client experience, employee development, and operational excellence. As we continue to expand, we are seeking a highly experienced and proactive HR Specialist & Executive Assistant to the CEO to support high-level strategic initiatives and drive team success across our multi-location business.



---



### Key Responsibilities



**HR & Team Development**



* Assist the CEO in developing and implementing a manager training program tailored for the spa industry.

* Conduct bi-monthly one-on-one meetings with front desk staff and managers to promote professional growth and address operational concerns.

* Review and enhance career development tracks for receptionists and managers.

* Lead quarterly performance reviews for all front desk staff and managers.

* Collaborate in project performance reviews, including tracking milestones and outcomes.



**Strategic Communications & Project Management**



* Communicate major project announcements, updates, and evaluations on behalf of the CEO.

* Support project execution and help ensure follow-through and accountability across departments.

* Manage and enhance online reputation by reviewing customer feedback, drafting responses, and proposing service resolutions.



**Executive Support**



* Manage the CEO’s calendar, travel, and strategic planning needs.

* Conduct business research to support decision-making and strategic initiatives.

* Assist in evaluating completed projects, including effectiveness, team performance, and client impact.

* Provide assistance on special projects and operational improvements across the organization.



---



### Qualifications



* 5–10 years of HR experience in an American business environment, preferably in multi-location operations.

* Proven experience in developing managers, leading teams, and implementing performance management systems.

* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; must be articulate, persuasive, and detail-oriented.

* Strong project management and organizational abilities.

* Demonstrated success in managing by objectives and driving results.

* High level of discretion, emotional intelligence, and ability to handle confidential information.

* Background in wellness, hospitality, or service-based industries is a plus.



---



What We Offer

* Collaborative and mission-driven team environment

* Growth potential in a fast-scaling company



---

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter, a self intro video, and some project summaries demonstrating your ability to communicate effectively and manage complex initiatives.
