title: Patient Experience Coordinator — Private Dental Practice
description:
About the Role

We are a private dental practice based in London, UK, looking for a reliable, intelligent and professional Patient Experience Coordinator to join our team. This is a long-term role with real growth potential. As we expand across multiple locations and build a wider dental referral network, the right person will grow with the business and take on increasing responsibility over time. You will be the first point of contact for patients — managing calls,
s and messages, coordinating appointments, and ensuring every patient receives a prompt, professional and caring response. Weekend availability is required as part of this role.



What You Will Be Doing



Patient Communication

• Answering inbound patient calls professionally and warmly

• Monitoring and responding to patient
s promptly

• Managing inbound WhatsApp enquiries and converting them to bookings

• Handling patient questions about treatments, pricing and availability

• Following up on missed calls and unbooked enquiries within 2 hours



Appointment & Diary Management

• Booking, rescheduling and cancelling patient appointments

• Liaising with clinical staff and coordinating diaries

• Sending appointment confirmations and reminders

• Chasing unconfirmed appointments to reduce no-shows



New Patient Onboarding

• Sending new patient registration forms and medical history questionnaires

• Chasing incomplete forms before the appointment date

• Ensuring new patient records are set up correctly before the first visit



Treatment Follow-Up

• Following up with patients who received a treatment plan but have not yet booked

• Sending information about payment and finance options where relevant

• Supporting conversion of enquiries into booked treatments



Recall & Retention

• Contacting lapsed patients who have not attended for 6 months or more

• Managing recall lists and tracking responses

• Re-engaging patients who cancelled and did not rebook



Referral Coordination

• Logging and tracking inbound referrals from partner practices and our emergency enquiry network

• Ensuring referred patients are contacted promptly and booked efficiently

• Maintaining an accurate referral log updated in real time



Pre-Appointment Preparation

• Sending directions, parking information and access instructions to all new patients ahead of their first visit

• Confirming the patient knows the duration of their appointment and what to bring

• Sending treatment-specific preparation instructions where relevant — for example fasting requirements before sedation or what to expect before an implant procedure



Payment & Finance

• Explaining finance and payment plan options clearly to patients who enquire about spreading the cost of treatment

• Sending payment links or invoices following treatment as directed

• Logging payments received and flagging any outstanding balances to the practice manager promptly



Post-Treatment Care

• Sending aftercare instructions to patients following their treatment

• Checking in with patients 24–48 hours after complex procedures to ensure they are recovering well

• Logging any post-treatment concerns raised by patients and escalating to the clinician immediately



Complaint Handling

• Taking initial details calmly and professionally when a patient raises a concern or complaint

• Logging the complaint formally and escalating to the practice owner immediately

• Ensuring every patient who raises a concern feels heard and receives a prompt acknowledgement while the matter is being addressed



Emergency Enquiry Handling

•      Triaging emergency dental calls correctly — understanding urgency levels and responding appropriately

•      Following a clear script for patients in acute pain to ensure they are seen promptly or directed to the right resource

•      Logging all emergency enquiries separately to track the volume and performance of the emergency dental referral network



Review Generation

•      Sending a structured follow-up message to every patient within 24 hours of their appointment requesting a Google review

•      Tracking which patients were asked and which left a review in a simple shared spreadsheet

•      Flagging patients who appear dissatisfied before they have the chance to leave a negative review

•      Monitoring
 and Instagram messages and comments and alerting the team to anything requiring a response



Social Media Posting & Management

• Posting one daily story on Instagram using content and direction provided by the team

• Publishing one post per week on Instagram as directed — coordinating with the clinician before and after to obtain content

• Publishing one post per week on
 using approved content

• Publishing one video or post per week on TikTok as directed

• Following up with the clinician before appointments to arrange content capture and after to collect photos or videos for posting

• Scheduling and queuing posts in advance where possible to maintain consistency

• Maintaining a simple monthly content calendar to ensure posting is planned and consistent rather than reactive

• Suggesting content ideas based on treatments, seasonal hooks and trending dental topics

• Ensuring a healthy mix of content types across all platforms — before and after cases, patient testimonials, educational content, promotional offers and behind the scenes

• Replying to every comment on posts promptly and professionally

• Responding to DMs across Instagram,
 and TikTok and directing interested followers to book an appointment

• Following relevant local accounts and engaging with the local community to build profile visibility

• Using relevant location-based and treatment-based hashtags on every post and story

• Tagging the practice location on every post and story across all platforms

• Engaging with trending audio and formats on TikTok to maximise organic reach

• Responding to TikTok comments quickly to take advantage of early engagement windows

• Checking Instagram and
 insights weekly and logging key metrics — follower growth, reach, engagement and enquiries generated

• Producing a brief weekly social media summary report flagging what is working, what is underperforming and suggested adjustments



Lead Tracking & Reporting

• Logging every inbound enquiry with source, date, treatment type and outcome in real time

• Tracking each lead through the pipeline — enquiry, booked, attended, converted or lost

• Producing a simple weekly summary report covering total calls, bookings made, enquiries lost and follow-ups outstanding

• Identifying patterns in missed or unconverted enquiries and flagging to the practice owner



General Administration

• Logging every enquiry accurately in the shared system in real time

• Supporting the practice manager with day-to-day administrative tasks

• Maintaining organised digital records across all platforms



What We Are Looking For

• Excellent spoken and written English — this is non-negotiable

• Warm, professional and empathetic communication style, especially with patients in discomfort or distress

• Previous experience in a customer service, patient care or administrative role

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls

• Comfortable using Google Workspace, WhatsApp,
 and basic CRM or booking systems

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Able to manage multiple tasks and prioritise effectively under pressure

• Dependable, punctual and self-motivated when working remotely

• Available to work some weekend hours as part of the agreed schedule



Nice to Have (Not Essential)

• Experience working with a dental, medical or healthcare practice

• Experience managing inbound calls for a UK-based business

• Experience managing social media accounts including Instagram, TikTok and
 — content planning, posting, engagement and basic performance tracking

• Experience with patient recall or treatment follow-up systems



Hours and Compensation

• 25 hours per week — days and shift pattern to be agreed based on your availability

• Weekend availability is required as part of this role

• Salary: $350–$450 per month USD depending on experience

• Paid monthly via Wise or similar

• Long-term ongoing position with genuine growth potential as the business expands



How to Apply

To be considered, please send the following:

• A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are a great fit for this role — this is mandatory and applications without a recording will not be considered

• Your CV or a summary of your relevant experience

• Your availability across the week, including weekends, and your preferred hours in UK time



Shortlisted candidates will be given a short paid trial task before a final offer is made. We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates proactively and is genuinely committed to delivering an excellent patient experience

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
INTRODUCTION: Hello! 
 (on IG). I'm an entrepreneur that started by buying rentals and is now developing houses by building and renovating in Nashville, TN. Now with ~35 units, I established a property management company (
) to manage them. My goal is 100 rental units, but to get there I need your help! I rely heavily on my team in place to keep things running smoothly so I can grow the company.



Location: Remote

Time Schedule: Business hours M - F in the U.S.A. (Overnight hours in the Philippines)

Compensation: $6-8/hr USD, paid bi-weekly via Onlinejobs.ph

Benefits: Paid USA bank holidays (~13 days) after trial period.



Job Summary:

Flywheel needs an APM to run the day to day business operations. You will report to me, Allan, for confirming outcome metrics and overcoming obstacles. You are the singular employee of Flywheel and play a critical role in its success!



The Perks:

    • Play a direct role in a growing local company and enjoy a distinct sense of satisfaction from seeing results that YOU made happen.

    • Enjoy autonomy of identifying and handling tasks using your own judgment, without micromanagement of a supervisor. 

    • Plenty of training provided to build on your existing experience and ensure your success!   



A Typical Week:

    • Receive notice of a tenant not renewing lease. Schedule contractor to begin turnover repairs.

    • Receive a maintenance request from a unit in the software, and forward to the appropriate vendor.

    • Follow up on certain tenants if rent not received on the 1st.

    • Run month-end reports and distribute to rental property owners.



Qualifications:

    • Read sections “Outcomes” & “Core Competencies” down below.

    • This job is not for a “first timer”. Only those with Property Management experience need apply.

    • Level of Completed Education: N/A

    • English Fluency: 4+ out of 5. Some accent is fine but must be easy to understand.



===============================================



Mission: To manage a rental property portfolio for maximum profitability, especially by turning vacancies quickly and handling repairs and maintenance requests quickly and cost-effectively.



Outcomes: Property Management 

    • Rent collections are at 100% by the end of each month (excluding detainer warrants).

    • Vacant units are filled in less than 3 weeks by getting units rent-ready, listing them, and screening tenants.

    • Global Vacancy stays at or below 5% on a trailing 30 day basis (different from the above in that low global vacancy means tenants are staying and renewing leases likely due to effective management)

    • All valid maintenance requests are completed within 7 days by quickly scheduling vendors and following up.

    • Recurring tasks are performed on time by completing each item in the SOP’s checklists (Ex: Interim inspections, monthly owner statements and distributions).

    • <24 hour response time on all property management-related
s, calls, & SMS. 



Core Competencies 						

    • Honesty & Integrity – Displays consistent, straightforward behavior. Always speaking in truth and not deception. Does not cut corners ethically.

    • Proactive problem solving – Tackles new problems using self-administered resources.

    • Own it – Sees tasks through to results (AKA tenacity or persistence) 

    • Assertiveness – Quick to take action, not afraid of conflict.

    • Checklist Aficionado - Thorough executor of to-do lists and SOPs.  

    • Professional Communication skills – Concise and clear via phone and written. Grammar is largely appropriate.

    • Intelligence –Retains information and thinks through tasks for optimum results at an above-average capability.

    • High Attention to Detail – Does not let details slip through the cracks by carefully keeping track of each one.

    • Work Ethic – Has no qualms about working many hours every day without dopamine distractions.

    • Computer Literate – Is comfortable with computer-based web applications.

    • Customer Service – Responds quickly to inquiries. Empathizing and moving them towards the goal.



TO APPLY: If you’ve read this far, show your attention to detail in your application: Add “FLYWHEEL” in all caps to the subject line (or title). Attach your resume and for a cover letter, use the application body to summarize your property management experience!

title: Sales Development Representative (Interior Design)
description:
*Do not reach out to the website - only applications submitted via OnlineJobs will be considered*



West Village Interior (
) is a high-end interior design firm serving offices, retail stores and homeowners in New York City. We specialize in transforming spaces with luxury designs, tailored aesthetics, and expert craftsmanship. Our clientele includes realtors, homebuilders, contractors, and property developers who seek high-quality interior design solutions. We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative  to generate leads, build relationships, and close sales with NYC-based clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Make 20-30 outbound calls per day to NYC-area real estate professionals.

2. Follow up with warm leads to book design consultations.

3. Maintain a structured pipeline using CRM tools to track leads, calls, follow-ups, and closed deals.

4. Conduct 30-40 design consultations per month through direct outreach and follow-ups.

5. Build strategic referral partnerships with NYC-based realtors, contractors, and home stagers.

6. Convert leads into 2-4 closed sales per month, with project sizes ranging from $5,000 - $25,000.



What We’re Looking For

1. 3+ years of experience in sales, real estate, home services, or interior design sales.

2. Strong ability to sell high-ticket services to affluent clients.

3. Fluent in English with a neutral or American-accented tone.

4. Ability to build trust with NYC homeowners and handle objections effectively.

5. Self-motivated and results-driven, comfortable with a commission plus salary role.

6. Familiarity with CRM tools, cold-calling software, and lead-tracking systems.

7. Comfortable using
, LinkedIn, and online communities for lead generation.

8. Must be available to work NYC business hours (9amET - 5pmET).



Compensation & Earnings Potential 

This role includes a reasonable base salary for stability while still offering uncapped commissions. Salary of $1k-$1.5k plus commissions of $500-$1.5k per month, averaging $1.7k to $2.5k per month total.



Why Join Us?

- Team is already doing 3+ closes per month with no salespeople.

- Fully remote work with flexible scheduling, selling in a thriving NYC market.

- Unlimited earning potential with no salary caps.

- Support and training provided, including call scripts, sales training, and marketing materials.



To be considered you must submit a voice recording, resume and portfolio if available.

title: Backend Operations Manager (Shopify Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
Requirements & Responsibilities



• Extensive experience managing Shopify fashion dropshipping stores

• Strong understanding of fashion operations (sizes, suppliers, fulfillment, quality control)

• Experience managing teams, assistants, and support staff

• Ability to build and improve SOPs and workflows

• Manage daily backend operations across multiple Shopify stores

• Handle supplier communication and daily product quotations

• Monitor order fulfillment, logistics, and potential issues

• Oversee customer support performance and escalations

• Organize team tasks and maintain operational efficiency

• Deliver weekly operational reports and improvement suggestions

• Work independently and take full ownership of backend operations



Benefits



• Fully remote

• Flexible schedule

• Long-term opportunity

• High level of autonomy

• Work directly with the founder

• Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling e-commerce business



How to Apply



Start your application with the word ORANGE.



Send ONLY:



1. Shopify stores you worked with

(include links + estimated monthly revenue)

(example: women fashion, streetwear, general apparel)

Application Title Format

4 Years Shopify Backend Manager – THUNDER



Important

• Generic applications



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be skipped.



We are only looking for high-level operators who can take full control of backend operations.



If you are not an A-player, do NOT apply.

title: Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)
description:
Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)

$500 Base + Performance Bonus



We are hiring a reliable appointment setter to call warm inbound leads from our
 ads. These are HVAC business owners who submitted a form and are expecting a follow-up.



This role is simple and focuses on consistency. You must be able to respond quickly when a new lead comes in, follow a short script, and book a consultation if they qualify.



Requirements:

 • Clear, confident English (easily understood)

 • Comfortable speaking to business owners

 • Able to follow a simple script

 • Calm, steady tone (not robotic)

 • Quiet workspace and headset

 • Stable internet connection

 • Available during U.S. Eastern business hours

 • Fast response time (must call new leads within 2–5 minutes)

 • Looking for a long-term, stable position



(If you need constant supervision or respond slowly to messages, this role is not a fit.)



Job Details:

 • You will follow up with warm inbound leads, not cold calls

 • Calls made through PhoneBurner or similar system (we provide access)

 • Script and short training videos provided

 • Call volume is low (1–5 calls per day, sometimes none)

 • You must log call results and notes

 • Follow-up attempts required if there is no answer



This is an execution-based role. Reliability and consistency are important.



Performance Bonus:

 • $15 for every qualified booked appointment

 • Bonus capped at $100 per month



Pay:

 • $500 per month base salary

 • Up to $100 monthly bonus



Paid Trial (1 Week):



We will select two candidates for a 1-week paid trial ($25).

During the trial, we evaluate:

 • Response speed

 • Tone

 • Script accuracy

 • Call logs

 • Professionalism

 • Ability to follow instructions



One candidate will be selected for the long-term position.



How to Apply:



Send a message with:

 1. A 30–45 second voice recording reading the script below

 2. Your availability in U.S. EST time



Applications without all items will not be reviewed.



Script for Voice Recording:



Hi, is this Mickey?



Hey Mickey, this is Mark.



You filled out our
 form about getting more 
 installs, so I’m just calling to follow up.



Did I catch you at a good time?

title: Production Project Manager
description:
We are looking for a virtual video production project manager to help manage video and animation projects for our video marketing agency. The ideal candidate is the perfect blend of 1) high attention to detail and organization that can help manage projects as a go-between between customer requests &
s and freelancers & editors, 2) a digital project management guru who can help engineer a ClickUp system to track projects and deadlines, make sure tasks are assigned with deadlines, and organize assets & communication, and 3) has a good video/design eye that can help source pre-production inspiration, mood board assets, review freelancer work, etc.



We are looking to start part time, but based on our need, and the value you bring to our business, we may be open to full-time in the next couple months. 



Specific tasks and responsibilities will include:

Following all customer
 communication and assigning tasks and deadlines to projects & freelancers.

Managing Click-Up project management top to bottom.

Voiceover sourcing, hiring, and managing

Casting Assistant: putting out casting calls, managing casting submission, and putting together talent decks for clients.

Location Scouting: sourcing online websites to find potential locations for live-shoots and putting together decks for clients.

Concept Development: Collecting potential "reference videos" as inspiration options, using ChatGPT to source potential concepts, etc. 



Most important job skills are: 1) high attention to detail, 2) excellent project management (using ClickUp), and 3) good eye for design.



Other attractive skills are basic video editing experience, experience working in video production or marketing agency, and ability to work on US time zone.

title: Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator  (Remote) – Healthcare Operations
description:
Evergreen Rehab & Wellness | Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada



About Evergreen Rehab & Wellness 



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness is a leading multidisciplinary healthcare organization serving the 

Greater Vancouver area, with clinics located in Coquitlam, Surrey, Langley, and Burnaby 

(Brentwood). 



With a 4.9/5.0 patient satisfaction rating and a growing team of 70+ healthcare practitioners, 

we provide integrated healthcare services including: 

? Physiotherapy 

? Chiropractic Care 

? Registered Massage Therapy 

? Naturopathic Medicine 

? Kinesiology 

? Rehabilitation & Wellness Services

 

As our organization continues to grow, we are expanding our finance and operations team to 

support the increasing complexity of our clinics. 



Position Overview 



We are seeking a Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator to support the financial operations 

of our healthcare clinics. 



This role is responsible for overseeing key accounting functions including billing reconciliation, 

financial reporting, contractor payment processing, insurance payment tracking, and 

operational financial analysis. 



The ideal candidate has strong accounting knowledge, high attention to detail, and experience 

managing financial workflows in a fast-paced organization. 



This position will work closely with clinic management and leadership to ensure financial 

accuracy, operational efficiency, and compliance with healthcare billing procedures. 



Key Responsibilities 

1. Insurance Billing & Revenue Monitoring 

? Monitor claim submissions for private insurance providers

? Track unsubmitted claims 

2. Billing & Claims Processing 

? Submit WSBC Invoices; Initial Reports and Extension Reports

? Ensure billing documentation is accurate and compliant 

? Identify billing discrepancies and coordinate corrections with clinic teams 

3. Financial Reporting & Analysis 

Prepare recurring operational and financial reports including: 

? Monthly EBITDA analysis

? Revenue and payment reconciliation reports 

? Operational performance tracking 

? Financial summaries for clinic leadership 

4. Independent Contractor Accounting 

? Prepare semi-monthly Independent Contractor payroll payments

? Update practitioner payment records 

? Reconcile practitioner revenue with billing records 

5. Tax & Compliance Support 

? Compile quarterly GST summaries

? Maintain accurate financial documentation for accounting and tax reporting 

? Assist with financial records required for external accounting review 

6. Insurance Payment Reconciliation 

? Monitor payments received from private insurers 

? Identify missing, delayed, or incorrect payments 

? Maintain organized payment tracking records 

7. Patient Scheduling Monitoring 

? Monitor unscheduled patients who have not booked recommended follow-up visits 

? Coordinate with clinic reception teams to support patient follow-up scheduling 

? Assist in maintaining continuity of patient care 



Compensation & Benefits 

? Full-time position (40 hours per week)

? Competitive monthly salary 

? 13th-month bonus after 12 months of successful employment 

? Fully remote work environment

? Professional development opportunities 

? Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing healthcare organization



Required Qualifications 

? 3–5+ years of accounting, finance, or billing experience

? Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting

? Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

? Strong English communication skills 

? Ability to manage financial workflows independently in a remote environment 

? Experience managing accounts receivable and financial reconciliation



Preferred Qualifications 

? Experience in healthcare accounting or clinic billing

? Familiarity with Jane App or healthcare practice management systems

? Knowledge of ICBC, WorkSafeBC (WSBC), and private insurance billing processes

? Experience working with independent contractor compensation structures

? Multilingual abilities (Korean, Mandarin/Chinese, French, or Farsi) are considered an 

asset 



Work Environment 

? 100% remote role

? Structured onboarding and training 

? Support from the VA Manager and leadership team

? Collaborative and supportive team environment 

? Opportunities for long-term career growth

title: Cold Email Outreach Specialist (Instantly.ai Setup + Training)
description:
This is not a done-for-you outreach job.



I’m looking for someone experienced with Instantly.ai who can set up the system with me and teach me how to run cold
 campaigns myself.



My goal is to fully understand how to run outreach campaigns inside Instantly, including campaign setup, deliverability, and automation, so that once everything is configured, I can manage campaigns independently.



I’m looking for someone who can walk me through the process step-by-step on Zoom and help me build a clean, repeatable system.



This role is part consultant, part technical setup, and part training.



What I Need Help With



You should be comfortable helping with the following:



• Setting up outreach domains and inboxes

• Connecting
 accounts to Instantly

•
 warm-up configuration

• Campaign structure and sequencing

• Lead list importing and segmentation

• Writing or improving cold
 sequences

• Deliverability best practices

• Reply handling and campaign optimization

• Teaching the overall system so I can manage campaigns myself



The goal is to build a clean outreach system from scratch that I understand and can operate independently.



Ideal Candidate



I’m looking for someone who:



• Has extensive experience using Instantly.ai

• Understands cold
 deliverability and domain setup

• Has built multiple cold
 outreach campaigns

• Is comfortable teaching and explaining systems clearly

• Is very detailed and organized

• Speaks fluent English





Because this work involves multiple steps and configuration details, being detailed is extremely important. Remember the word, detailed.



How This Will Work



We will work together via Zoom to:



• Set up the outreach infrastructure

• Configure Instantly properly

• Build the first campaigns together

• Document the workflow so I can repeat it in the future



Once the system is built, I should be able to run outreach campaigns myself.



Experience Required



Please only apply if you have experience with:



• Instantly.ai

• Cold
 infrastructure

•
 deliverability

• Outreach campaign building



If you have examples of campaigns you’ve built, please include them.



This will likely be a short consulting project (approximately 10–15 hours) to set up the system and train me.

How to Apply

title: Systems & Marketing Integrator
description:
Social Media Growth & Conversion Integrator



**Gig-to-Full-Time | Path to Department Head**



This starts as a **project-based / gig role** with a **clear path to becoming a full-time Department Head** for the right person.



I’m looking for a **high-level Social Media Growth & Conversion Integrator** — someone who knows how to turn **authority, reviews, and content into predictable inbound leads**, not vanity metrics.



Likes and views don’t move the needle here.

**Systems, conversion, and ownership do.**



### What’s Already in Place



* A strong personal brand with real-world credibility

* **High-volume Google My Business and Zillow reviews**

* Proven market trust and documented results



What’s missing is someone who can **architect, optimize, and scale the entire ecosystem** — and eventually **own it end-to-end**.



This is **not a posting VA role**.

This is **strategy + execution + systems + leadership**.



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Platform Optimization & Growth Systems



**YouTube (Primary Growth Engine)**



* Optimize titles, descriptions, tags, and keywords for search + intent

* Build TOF / MOF / BOF CTAs into every video

* Design high-conversion link and offer structure

* Turn long-form content into lead-generating assets



**Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn,
**



* Profile, bio, and positioning optimization

* Caption structure built for clarity, authority, and conversion

* Pinned posts and highlight strategy

* Platform-native execution (no copy-paste thinking)



### Reviews & Authority Leverage



* Convert **Google My Business reviews** into trust multipliers:



  * Social proof content

  * Conversion-focused CTAs

  * Funnel reinforcement

* Repurpose **Zillow reviews** into:



  * Short-form authority content

  * Landing page and funnel assets

  * Objection-handling messaging



### Funnels, Automation & CRM Integration



* Design and refine **Top / Middle / Bottom funnel systems**

* Audit and rebuild all **link flows** (bios, landing pages, forms)

* Ensure **every lead routes cleanly into Follow Up Boss**

* Set up tagging, sources, and automations for clean follow-up

* Improve lead quality through intent-based filtering

* Eliminate friction between content ? click ? conversation



### Brand Ownership & Leadership



* Maintain premium brand positioning across platforms

* Track performance and optimize using real data

* Bring creative ideas grounded in conversion and authority

* Build, document, and systemize repeatable processes

* Over time: **lead and scale this function as a department**



## Who This Role Is For



* You think in **systems, funnels, and leverage**

* You’re as comfortable executing as you are strategizing

* You want **ownership**, not task lists

* You’re excited by the idea of **building a department**, not just filling a seat

* You care about results, not optics



## Required Skills

* Advanced digital marketing fundamentals

* Strong **YouTube SEO and social platform optimization**

* Funnel strategy (TOF / MOF / BOF)

* Conversion-focused copywriting and formatting

* CRM and automation experience (**Follow Up Boss a major plus**)

* Analytical mindset with creative execution

* Strong written English

* Experience with **real estate or personal brands**

* Google My Business optimization

* Review-based marketing and social proof strategy

* Familiarity with Zapier, landing pages, or CRM automations

title: SEO / Brand / PR Specialist (Full-Time, Full Remote)
description:
SEO / Brand / PR Specialist (Full-Time, Full Remote)



Overview



We’re hiring a full-time, senior-leaning Virtual Assistant to own day-to-day SEO execution and

brand/PR outreach. This person will represent our brand externally, build relationships with

publishers and partners, and consistently ship SEO content + backlinks that drive rankings and

reputation.



This is not a “basic VA” role. You’ll be expected to operate independently, write clearly at a

native level, and manage multiple workstreams without constant oversight.



Core Responsibilities



1) SEO Strategy + Execution (Weekly Output)

? Run keyword research and topic planning using SEMrush, SurferSEO, and related tools.

? Build and maintain a blog content calendar with clear targets (keyword, intent, outline,

internal links, backlink plan).

? Execute on-page SEO for every page/article:

? Titles/meta, headers, schema opportunities, internal linking, topical clusters,

image SEO, and “people also ask” coverage.

? Track rankings, traffic, impressions, and CTR; report weekly on wins, losses, and next

actions.



2) Content Creation (Ranking-Focused)

? Write and publish 3 SEO-optimized blogs per week (native-level English, clear structure,

non-fluffy, conversion-aware).

? Update/refresh existing content to improve ranking and keep pages current.

? Build proper internal linking across the site and propose new pages where gaps exist.

? Create supporting assets as needed (FAQs, short landing page sections, comparison

pages, glossary pages).



3) Backlinks And Mentions + Digital PR Outreach

? A key KPI is the # of new mentions and backlinks we score every month. Find the most

relevant blogs/pages/articles we must get on, and track down a way to contact and get

mentioned there.

? Build backlink opportunities via:

? InsertLink (or similar platforms)

? Direct outreach to website owners, journalists, bloggers, and brands

? Partnership swaps where appropriate

? Pitch guest posts, link insertions, brand mentions, listicle placements, and resource links.

? Maintain an outreach CRM (sheet is fine): targets,
s sent, replies, follow-ups,

outcomes, live links.

? Ensure backlinks are clean and relevant (no spam networks, no toxic placements).



4) AI SEO / LLM Visibility

? Implement AI SEO tactics to increase visibility in AI search and assistants:

? Improve entity coverage, structured content, FAQs, author credibility, and

“answer-first” formatting.

? Identify content types that win in AI summaries and optimize accordingly.

? Maintain a playbook of what’s working and apply it across new + existing content.



5) Technical SEO Coordination (With Devs)

? Identify technical SEO issues (indexing, site speed basics, CWV flags, broken links,

redirect chains, sitemap/robots, schema errors) shown in Semrush, Ahrefs and Search

Console.

? Write clear, developer-friendly tickets:

? What’s wrong

? Why it matters

? Priority level

? How to validate the fix

? Coordinate implementation and verify changes post-launch.



6) Competitor Backlink Intelligence

? Analyze competitor backlink profiles and identify high-quality sites we should pursue.

? Build a “replicate list” of competitor placements (guest posts, resource pages,

directories, link inserts) and execute outreach to win similar or better links.

? Track competitor moves (new pages, new links, ranking jumps) and propose

counter-actions weekly.



7) Content Distribution + Syndication

? Repurpose every major content piece into distribution assets (short posts, summaries,

announcements) and coordinate posting/placement

? Post thought-leader level content on our Linkedin as pages/articles



8) E-E-A-T + Credibility Building

? Improve site credibility signals for both Google and AI/LLM visibility:

? author pages, editorial standards, sourcing/citations, proof elements

? case studies, methodology/process pages, trust blocks, media/press assets

? Ensure content is written to win “answer-first” placement and AI summaries while

maintaining brand tone and accuracy.



9) Reputation + SERP Defense

? Monitor branded search results and key reputation queries to protect page-1 visibility.

? Build and optimize “defensive” content assets (brand pages, founder/team pages, press

page, comparisons, FAQs) to push positive/neutral coverage up.

? Coordinate outreach to secure credible third-party coverage that strengthens brand trust

and offsets negative or inaccurate results.



10) Partnerships + Co-Marketing Placements

? Identify complementary brands, agencies, tools, and communities for partnership

opportunities.

? Pitch and coordinate co-marketing initiatives: partner directories, resource pages,

newsletter swaps, guest features, co-authored content.

? Maintain a partnership pipeline and manage follow-ups through to placement and link

acquisition.



Tools You Must Be Comfortable With



? SEMrush

? SurferSEO

? Google Search Console

? Google Analytics (basic proficiency is fine)

? InsertLink

? Ahrefs

? Hunter / other
 finding service

?
 outreach

? Screaming Frog

? Google Sheets / Docs, Slack, project management tools



Required Skills



? 100% fluent English (near-native writing + speaking)

? Strong PR/outreach communication: confident, friendly, professional

? Proven ability to earn backlinks through outreach (not just “I know what backlinks are”)

? Strong SEO writing skills: intent-matching, structured, internal linking, SEO formatting

? Organized operator: pipelines, tracking, weekly deliverables, consistent follow-through

? Can represent a brand and maintain tone standards across communications

? Able to collaborate with developers and translate SEO needs into clear tasks



Nice-to-Haves



? Strong understanding/experience in the music industry and how the independent artist

space works

? Experience with high-output publishing (2–5 posts/week) while maintaining quality

? Past success improving rankings in competitive niches

? Basic understanding of schema markup and how to validate it

title: Part-Time WordPress Specialist (ACF PRO, CSS, Page Builders)
description:
Company: IT firm providing managed support for law firms

Hours: ~40 hours/month (Part-time, Flexible Schedule)



About Us

We are a growing IT firm that provides technology support and services for law firms. We manage multiple WordPress websites for our clients, and we're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented WordPress Specialist to join our team and handle routine website updates, content changes, and landing page builds.



This is a part-time, long-term role — perfect for someone looking for consistent, ongoing work with a professional team.



What You'll Be Doing

Content Updates – Updating text, images, and blog posts across client websites

ACF PRO Management – Adding, editing, and managing pages and sections built with Advanced Custom Fields PRO (flexible content, repeater fields, field groups, etc.)

Design Tweaks – Making CSS adjustments and minor layout changes to match design requirements

Gravity Forms – Creating, editing, and maintaining forms

Landing Pages – Building and updating landing pages using Bricks Builder, Oxygen Builder, and/or Elementor Pro

General Maintenance – Working with cPanel and Cloudflare as needed for hosting and performance tasks

What We're Looking For



Required Skills:

? Strong working knowledge of WordPress (3+ years preferred)

? Hands-on experience with Advanced Custom Fields PRO (flexible content layouts, custom field groups, repeaters, options pages)

? Comfortable writing and editing CSS and basic PHP

? Experience with at least one of these page builders: Bricks, Oxygen, or Elementor Pro (experience with multiple is a big plus)

? Experience with Gravity Forms

? Familiarity with cPanel and Cloudflare

Ideal Qualities:



???? Detail-oriented — our clients are law firms, so accuracy matters

???? Self-starter who can manage their own time and meet deadlines

???? Strong communication skills in English (written)

???? Reliable and responsive — you keep us updated on progress

???? Able to follow brand guidelines and maintain consistency across sites

Work Arrangement

~40 hours per month (approximately 10 hours/week)

Flexible schedule — work when it suits you, as long as tasks are completed on time

Long-term position — we want someone who will grow with us



How to Apply



To apply, please send us:



Your resume/CV

A link to your portfolio or examples of WordPress sites you've worked on

A brief description of your experience with ACF PRO and at least one of the page builders listed (Bricks, Oxygen, or Elementor Pro)

Start your application with the word "LAWTECH" in the subject so we know you've read the full listing

We look forward to hearing from you! ????

title: Client Services Liaison
description:
About the Role

Our firm is seeking a Client Services Liaison to serve as the welcoming voice and primary point

of contact for prospective and current clients. This role is essential in managing incoming leads,

guiding potential clients through our intake process, and helping convert inquiries into retained

clients.



The ideal candidate is personable, organized, and confident in communicating with individuals

who may be navigating important legal planning decisions. This role requires a client-first

mindset, strong communication skills, and the ability to build trust quickly. Experience working

in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the first point of contact for prospective and current clients.

- Respond to and manage incoming leads through phone,
, and other communication channels.

- Guide prospects through the firm’s intake process and introduce them to our services.

- Build rapport with potential clients and help convert qualified leads into retained clients.

- Schedule consultations and coordinate appointments with attorneys and team members.

- Maintain organized client records and communications throughout the intake process.

- Conduct timely follow-ups with leads and clients to ensure a positive experience.

- Utilize platforms such as Calendly, Dialpad, Lawmatics, or similar applications to manage scheduling, calls, and client intake.

- Work collaboratively with attorneys and staff to ensure a smooth client onboarding process.



Qualifications

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Sales experience or strong ability to build relationships and convert leads.

- Professional, friendly, and client-focused demeanor.

- Experience working in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates practice is highly preferred.

- Proficiency with CRM, scheduling, and communication tools such as Calendly, Dialpad, Lawmatics, or similar systems.

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to communicate with empathy and professionalism when handling sensitive matters.



What We Value

- A welcoming and positive attitude

- Strong listening skills and emotional intelligence

- Professionalism and discretion

- Reliability and attention to detail

- Commitment to providing exceptional client service.

title: Project Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Project Manager who brings more than just credentials to the table — someone who genuinely cares about the work, the team, and the outcome. If your default response to a challenge is "How can I help?", you might be exactly who we need.

This role sits at the heart of our operations. You will own project timelines, coordinate cross-functional teams, and ensure that every initiative — big or small — moves forward with clarity and purpose.



We are deliberate about culture. The right candidate will stand out in three key areas:



1. Outstanding Communication — You keep Account Managers informed, surface blockers early, and make sure nobody is left guessing. Written and verbal clarity is non-negotiable.

2. Reliability — Deadlines are commitments. You follow through, you own your deliverables, and your team can count on you without having to check up.

3. "How Can I Help?" Attitude — You step in where needed, remove obstacles for your team, and lead by example. You are a multiplier, not a bottleneck.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
About Us:

Our goal is to help dealers grow their digital presence through a seamless and feature-rich online experience.

This role involves strategic content creation, technical SEO tasks, and daily collaboration with our Organic Marketing Specialist to support ongoing optimization initiatives. The ideal candidate should have strong SEO expertise, experience using SEMrush and WordPress, and the ability to handle multiple projects at once.

Benefits:

How to Apply:

Submit your resume, cover letter, and any relevant SEO case studies or portfolio work to us through Online Jobs messaging. To ensure you are a real person, please add the word "Octopus" somewhere into your application message. We look forward to your application!

title: Front-End Software Developer (Android)
description:
Your contributions take flight to save lives and protect both our communities and our country.



WHO WE ARE 

Flyhound is a cutting-edge drone payload company focused on public safety. We specialize in the rapid detection and localization of individuals honing on their mobile phones. Our mission is simple but powerful: help first responders in finding people in emergencies to save lives. 

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We are seeking a talented Front-End Software Developer (mid-level) to lead the development of our end-user software product on an Android tablet platform that visually displays data received from our airborne payload solution. You will work closely with the founding team and play a pivotal role in the design, implementation, and optimization of the embedded system software architecture.

This role requires expertise in building robust, high-performance software for large-screen format devices where real-time data flow is essential. As the software lead, you will take ownership of building a new application from the ground up, ensuring seamless data transmission between the airborne payload and the ground-based front-end application. While the drone’s control is independent, your focus will be on displaying data received from the airborne payload on the application including unique IDs of individuals as well as GPS coordinates to be displayed as interactive pins.  

This role demands a proactive, innovative problem-solver who is comfortable making strategic decisions and implementing best practices in software development, all while contributing to the broader technical vision of the company.

KEY REPONSIBILITIES 

• Lead the design, implementation, and optimization of our frond-end application for Android tablets.

• Manage data flow from airborne payload to ground-based front-end application in real-time.

• Display data including unique IDs and GPS coordinates as interactive pins on a map that can be stored and accessed offline as our use-case requires offline capability.

• Ensure software modularity, scalability, and support for over-the-air (OTA) updates.

• Establish and maintain best practices for software development and team collaboration.



WHAT’S REQUIRED



• Relevant experience or education in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.

• Proven experience with Android programming through Kotlin and other cross-platform languages.

• Strong problem-solving skills.



Key Attributes for Success:

• Entrepreneurial spirit: You will be working closely with the founding team, so it is crucial to be comfortable taking initiative, adapting to evolving challenges, and contributing creatively to the company’s growth.

• Innovative problem-solver: Capable of anticipating issues and independently developing effective solutions with minimal guidance.

• Collaborative team player: Strong interpersonal skills and a passion for working together to build a product that delivers real-world impact.

• Flexible and adaptable: Able to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced startup environment, embracing change and quickly adjusting to new directions when needed.



THE OTHER STUFF 

Flyhound is based in Syracuse, USA and the role is fully remote and intended for hire within the Philippines.

Pay

, please also answer the following:

Position Overview

Qualifications

Availability

We are hiring immediately and look forward to meeting great candidates.

title: Meta & Google Ads Specialist
description:
Local Lead Generation | Home Services | Remote



About the Role



We are looking for a Meta & Google Ads Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale paid advertising campaigns for our growing portfolio of home service businesses, primarily in the countertop and remodeling industry.



This is a performance-focused role.

You will not be responsible for creative production.



We already have a dedicated creative team handling ad design, video production, and copywriting.



Your focus is simple — but challenging:



Understand each client’s business and service area



Build effective campaign structures



Monitor campaign performance daily



Make data-driven optimizations



Continuously improve CPL, lead quality, and ROAS



If you enjoy testing, optimizing, and improving campaign performance, this role is for you.

Campaign Setup & Management



Build and launch Meta Ads campaigns, including:



Lead Forms



Messenger campaigns



Website conversion campaigns



Create and manage Google Ads campaigns, including:



Search campaigns



Local Services Ads (experience is a plus)



Structure campaigns effectively by:



Service type



Location



Customer intent



Optimization & Performance



Monitor campaign performance daily



Adjust budgets, bids, targeting, and campaign structure



Diagnose lead quality issues and recommend improvements



Continuously work to reduce CPL and improve conversion rates



Strategy & Performance Insights



Review client goals, services, and target markets before campaign launches



Provide recommendations on:



Scaling winning campaigns



Pausing underperforming campaigns



Restructuring campaign setups



Share clear internal performance insights and recommendations



(No client-facing sales responsibilities required.)



What You Will NOT Be Doing



This role is strictly focused on performance marketing.



You will NOT be responsible for:



Creating ad creatives



Designing graphics or videos



Writing ad copy from scratch



Communicating with leads or closing sales



Your sole focus is campaign performance and optimization.

We primarily work with home service businesses, including:



Stone & countertop companies



Remodeling companies



Experience with local lead generation campaigns is required.



Requirements



Proven experience managing Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns



Strong understanding of local lead generation advertising



Ability to analyze campaign data and make confident optimization decisions



Comfortable managing multiple ad accounts



Highly organized, reliable, and performance-driven



Experience with home service businesses is a major advantage.



Compensation & Growth



Competitive base pay based on experience



Yearly performance-based salary increases



Opportunity to grow with a scaling marketing agency



Long-term position for the right candidate



We reward results and performance, not just time spent.



How to Apply

Your resume



A short video explaining why you would be a good fit for this role



Examples of campaigns or results you have managed



Applicants must speak fluent English.

title: CEO Assistant for Chain Spa in US
description:
**Location:** Remote www.cloud9.spa

**Employment Type:** Full-Time



Please do not apply for the following situation

- You are an agency

- You are working multiple jobs

- You are jumping from job to job and cannot hold a job for less than 2 years

- You do not have US employer references

- You have less than 3 years of full time EA experience



About Us:

We are a rapidly growing chain of family-friendly spas committed to exceptional client experience, employee development, and operational excellence. As we continue to expand, we are seeking a highly experienced and proactive HR Specialist & Executive Assistant to the CEO to support high-level strategic initiatives and drive team success across our multi-location business.



---



### Key Responsibilities



**HR & Team Development**



* Assist the CEO in developing and implementing a manager training program tailored for the spa industry.

* Conduct bi-monthly one-on-one meetings with front desk staff and managers to promote professional growth and address operational concerns.

* Review and enhance career development tracks for receptionists and managers.

* Lead quarterly performance reviews for all front desk staff and managers.

* Collaborate in project performance reviews, including tracking milestones and outcomes.



**Strategic Communications & Project Management**



* Communicate major project announcements, updates, and evaluations on behalf of the CEO.

* Support project execution and help ensure follow-through and accountability across departments.

* Manage and enhance online reputation by reviewing customer feedback, drafting responses, and proposing service resolutions.



**Executive Support**



* Manage the CEO’s calendar, travel, and strategic planning needs.

* Conduct business research to support decision-making and strategic initiatives.

* Assist in evaluating completed projects, including effectiveness, team performance, and client impact.

* Provide assistance on special projects and operational improvements across the organization.



---



### Qualifications



* 5–10 years of HR experience in an American business environment, preferably in multi-location operations.

* Proven experience in developing managers, leading teams, and implementing performance management systems.

* Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; must be articulate, persuasive, and detail-oriented.

* Strong project management and organizational abilities.

* Demonstrated success in managing by objectives and driving results.

* High level of discretion, emotional intelligence, and ability to handle confidential information.

* Background in wellness, hospitality, or service-based industries is a plus.



---



What We Offer



* Opportunity to work closely with executive leadership

* Collaborative and mission-driven team environment

* Growth potential in a fast-scaling company



---



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume, a brief cover letter, a self intro video, and some project summaries demonstrating your ability to communicate effectively and manage complex initiatives.

title: YouTube Video Editor / 2.5D Animator
description:
Magnetic Chemistry is a relationship psychology education brand creating faceless YouTube content for women ages 25-45. We use AI-cloned voiceovers (ElevenLabs) and custom 2.5D illustrated characters to produce research-backed relationship insight videos.



We are hiring a video editor to animate our pre-made illustration library and produce publish-ready YouTube videos.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Animate pre-made 2.5D character illustrations (layered PNG/PSD assets) with subtle motion — parallax, expressions, transitions, and scene composition

- Sync animated visuals to AI-generated voiceover audio files

- Composite full YouTube videos: animated characters + backgrounds + text overlays + transitions + background music

- Create thumbnails for each video using the brand's asset library

- Deliver raw project files alongside rendered finals



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

- Complete visual asset library: 113 custom-illustrated modular characters, expressions, poses, hairstyles, and backgrounds — all layered and ready for animation

- Finished voiceover audio files for each video

- Detailed editor brief per video with visual direction notes and scene breakdown

- Brand color palette and style guidelines



REQUIRED SKILLS:

- Adobe After Effects (primary tool for character animation and compositing)

- Experience with puppet rigging, parallax animation, or 2.5D motion from layered static illustrations

- Audio sync — matching visual cues and transitions to voiceover timing

- Thumbnail design (Photoshop or Canva)

- Reliable internet and ability to upload/download large files via Google Drive

- English proficiency for understanding briefs and revision communication



PREFERRED (NOT REQUIRED):

- Experience editing faceless YouTube channels or explainer-style animated content

- Motion graphics or kinetic typography skills

- Familiarity with YouTube pacing and visual storytelling



THE OPPORTUNITY:

This starts as a per-video contract. We'll work closely on the first 3 videos to establish workflow and quality standards. After validation, top performers will be offered a monthly retainer with consistent ongoing work as our channel scales. Target volume is 2-3 videos per week. Video length is 8-12 minutes.



TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE:

1. Portfolio or reel showing 2.5D animation or character animation from static assets (YouTube samples ideal)

2. Your per-video rate for an 8-12 minute animated video (our range is $50-$75 USD)

3. Your typical turnaround time per video

4. Your weekly availability (hours)

title: YouTube long form Affordable Video Editor
description:
Looking for Long-Term YouTube Video Editor (Real Estate / Relocation  Talking Head): 



to help me grow my YouTube channel. My content focuses on relocation, real estate education, & talking-head videos in the Memphis metro area (including North Mississippi & Eastern Arkansas). The goal is to build subscribers, views, & long-term monetization, so I want someone who can grow with me as the channel scales.



In the beginning, I’ll handle most of the heavy lifting. I run footage through my automation script workflow & CapCut Pro to remove pauses, filler words, green screen & rough cuts. Your role will be to polish, format, & elevate the videos so they feel professional, flashy, clean, & engaging.



What I Need:

• Edit talking-head relocation videos into polished ~8-minute YouTube content

• Add a strong opening flashy hook, fast pacing, & smooth transitions

• Insert motion graphics, animated headings, callouts, & light branding

• Source search relevant LOCAL B-roll (photos, short clips, neighborhood visuals) to reduce on-screen talking time

• Mix in maps, neighborhood highlights, stats overlays, & subtle zoom effects

• Keep videos visually changing every 60 seconds

• Add light background music + clean audio leveling

• Deliver YouTube-ready format thumbnail in 4K



Style Direction:

Educational 1st, slightly entertaining, fast-moving, clean, & trustworthy. Must find local royalty-free content on the video topic, over generic B-roll, so the videos feel authentic & authoritative.



Workflow:

• Raw footage usually under 15 minutes

• Final video about 8 minutes

• I provide format + direction

• Looking for consistency & long-term collaboration -2 video per week.



Budget (Starting):

Around $20 per 8-minute video to start. As the channel grows, your rate will grow with it. I’m looking for someone hungry, dependable, & detail-oriented who wants steady work & long-term growth.

Send your sample link.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Job Posting: Data Analyst

Company: TBD

Location: 100% Remote

Work Schedule: US Central Time (Graveyard Shift) 

Role Type: Independent Contractor



About the Company

The Client is a privately funded energy investment firm specializing in the acquisition and management of producing and non-producing mineral and royalty interests across key U.S. basins with a specific focus in the Permian Basin. 



The Opportunity

We are inviting a proactive Data Analyst to join our lean, elite team. You will own the end-to-end data lifecycle—from managing the corporate SQL database to generating critical PHDWin economic models—ensuring our leadership team has real-time, accurate visibility into every asset we manage.



What You’ll Do

>Database Management: Maintain and administer the corporate SQL database, ensuring accurate and up-to-date information.

>Economic Reporting & Analysis: Regularly utilize PHDWin to generate high-integrity cashflow reports and onelines that serve as the foundation for the engineering team’s reserves analysis.

>Engineering Support: Work side-by-side with Reservoir Engineers to input, validate, and manage production forecasts, reserves, and economic evaluations.

>Insights & Visualization: Build and manage data models/relationships into dynamic dashboards and reports using SQL, Excel, Power BI, Spotfire, or other similar tools to support cross-functional internal stakeholders decision-making.

Quality Control: Perform quality control checks and troubleshoot data discrepancies across systems.

>Process Automation: Identify repetitive tasks and develop scripts to automate workflows and improve data accessibility and integrity.

>Cross-Functional Collaboration: Act as the key liaison between Engineering, Accounting, and Finance teams to ensure seamless information flow across the company.



What You Bring (Required)

>Advanced SQL Mastery: Expert understanding of relational database logic and writing complex query architecture.

>Database Infrastructure & Growth: Proven experience managing an existing Microsoft Azure SQL environment, with the ability to maintain, improve, and grow it through custom automations and workflows.

Data Visualization: Proven experience creating executive-level reports in Power BI, Spotfire, or similar tools.

>Analytical Mindset: Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to troubleshoot complex data discrepancies.

>Self-Sourcing Solutions: Proven ability to troubleshoot and build technical workflows independently without needing a manual or technical supervisor.

>Communication: Exceptional English proficiency, specifically the ability to translate complex technical data findings into clear business insights for executive leadership.

>Operational Alignment: Initial 100% overlap with US Central Time during your integration phase. As you establish your 'Founding Analyst' rhythm, we prioritize results over 'clock-time,' allowing flexibility and reduced graveyard hours.

>Proactive Team Integration: Team player attitude to work within a small team that interacts across the entire company with a willingness to take on special projects as they arise.



Preferred Skills 

>Prior experience with reserves software such as PHDWin and reservoir engineering softwares such as Combocurve.

>Familiarity with SEC Reserve Reporting standards.

>Working knowledge of scripting languages (e.g., Python, VBA) for automation.

>Familiarity with data governance practices and systems integration.

>Previous experience in the Oil & Gas or Energy sector.



Why Join Us?

>Ownership & Autonomy: You won’t just be a cog in a machine. You will have the unique opportunity to construct our entire data department from scratch. We value results over activity; we do not micromanage—you will be the boss of your own day-to-day workflow.

>Architect the Future: From database architecture to automation, you have the creative and technical freedom to design our end-to-end data lifecycle that drives our entire firm.

>Elite Industry Mentorship: While we expect you to lead the technical data strategy, we are committed to teaching you the intricacies of the U.S. Oil & Gas industry. You will work directly with our leadership team, gaining specialized knowledge in one of the world's most complex asset classes.

>Direct Impact: In our lean, elite team, your insights directly influence multi-million dollar investment decisions. You won't just be making reports; you’ll be providing the intelligence which is the foundation of our growth strategy.



Benefits

>Premium Compensation: We offer a highly competitive fixed service fee. We are looking for an expert, and we are prepared to pay for that level of proficiency.

>Performance-Based Bonuses: We believe in rewarding excellence. You’ll be eligible for discretionary bonuses based on your performance.

>Generous Paid Time Off: 15–20 days of combined Vacation and Sick Leave. We want you at your best, which means ensuring you have time to unplug and recharge.

>Holidays: We observe U.S. Federal Holidays with additional flexibility for Philippine Holidays provided with notice.

>Home Office Stipend: A specialized home office allowance will be provided.

>Professional Development: We are committed to your growth and will underwrite niche industry training or software certifications (e.g., PHDWin) for the right candidate.

>Long-term Stability: You aren't just a temporary contractor; we are looking for a long-term partner to grow with West Bend as we scale our operations.

title: Freelance Video Editor – Meta Ad Creatives
description:
Who we are

Ou brand is a growing online fragrance brand based in the Netherlands. We sell premium perfumes and are actively scaling our advertising on Meta 
 & Instagram). We're looking for a video editor to join our small team for a stable, long-term weekly collaboration.



What the job is

Every week, we film new content. You receive the raw footage and edit it into finished Meta ad creatives. We handle strategy and filming, you focus entirely on editing.

This is simple, repeatable work with a clear weekly rhythm. If you're reliable and your work converts, this is a stable long-term role.



The two formats you'll edit

1. UGC-style short-form videos (15–30 seconds): Authentic, natural-looking content. Lo-fi style: it should feel real, not over-produced.

2. Compilation ads: Multiple clips edited together into one punchy, scroll-stopping ad.



Exactly what you'll do in each video

- Cut and trim clips to the right length and pace

- Assemble footage: b-rolls, UGC clips, product close-ups

- Add transitions between clips

- Add sound effects and background music

- Insert images into the video (Trustpilot review screenshots, product bundles, promo banners)

- Add captions or subtitles



Each video takes around 45–60 minutes to edit. No complex effects or animation needed, clean, fast-paced cuts that make people stop scrolling.



Weekly schedule

We film every Wednesday

You receive a batch of raw footage shortly after: usually 3–5 videos + UGC clips

Batch size varies from week to week

Deadline: finished videos returned by end of the same week

All communication via written brief: no time zone issues, no calls required



Pay

$4–$6 per finished video.

Typical weekly earnings: $15–$30 depending on how many videos are in the batch.

Paid weekly, reliably. We are consistent and we always pay on time.

Editors with a strong ecommerce or beauty portfolio can discuss a higher rate.



What we need from you

- Experience editing short-form social media video (TikTok, Reels,
 ads)

- Portfolio with at least a few ecommerce, beauty, or lifestyle examples

- Reliable with deadlines every week, on time

- Good with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

- Able to follow a written brief in English without needing calls

- Comfortable inserting image overlays (review screenshots, product cards) into video



How to apply

Send your application with:

- 2–3 links to videos you've edited, social ads or short-form content preferred

- A short intro: who are you and how long have you been editing?

- Your available hours per week

- 5 stores you have worked for



ATTENTION CHECK Important, please read

- To show you've read this job post carefully, please start your message

with the word "GEUR" (this is the Dutch word for fragrance).

- Then answer this question in 2–3 sentences:

- What is one editing technique you always use to make a short video more engaging?

Messages that don't follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



The top 2–3 applicants will be invited to a paid trial week. We send you 3 real briefings and you edit 3 real videos. At the end of the week we review together and decide if we're a great fit.



We're building something long-term. Great editors who grow with us get consistent work and better rates over time.

title: Facebook Ads Coach / Mentor — Teach Me to Run Profitable Meta Campaigns (Hourly, Part-Time)
description:
I’m a Melbourne-based entrepreneur running an AI-powered business that serves medical spas and aesthetic clinics in Australia. I’m currently running
 lead generation campaigns, but I need to deeply understand the mechanics behind what I’m doing — not just follow templates.



I’m looking for an experienced
 Ads specialist to coach me 1-on-1 via screen share (Google Meet or Zoom). This is NOT a campaign management role. You will NOT be running my ads. Your job is to teach me how to do it myself.



What This Role Looks Like

3 x 1-hour sessions per week via Google Meet or Zoom (days/times flexible to your schedule)

I share my screen showing my live
 Ads Manager account

I click through the settings while you explain the WHY behind each action and strategy

You walk me through campaign structure, ad sets, creative strategy, audience targeting, budget settings, and data analysis

Think of this as a mentor/apprentice dynamic — you teach, I execute, you correct and explain



What I Need You to Teach Me

Campaign architecture: How to properly structure campaigns, ad sets, and ads for lead generation

Audience targeting: Custom audiences, lookalikes, interest stacking, broad vs. narrow strategies

Creative strategy: What makes scroll-stopping ad copy and creative, how to test hooks, angles, and formats

Budget & bidding: CBO vs. ABO, daily vs. lifetime budgets, cost caps, bid strategies

Advantage+ features: When to use Advantage+ campaigns, placements, and audience — and when NOT to

Pixel & CAPI: Conversion tracking setup, event optimization, and attribution

Reading data: Which metrics actually matter, when to kill an ad, when to scale, when to wait

Scaling strategies: How to go from testing to scaling without destroying performance



Requirements

- Minimum 2 years hands-on experience running
/Meta Ads (not just boosting posts)

- Experience with lead generation campaigns specifically (not just e-commerce/ROAS)

- Strong spoken English — you must be able to clearly explain concepts, not just execute them

- Patient teaching style — I’ll ask a lot of “why” questions and I expect thoughtful answers

- Available for screen share calls during Australian business hours (AEST) or flexible evening times

- Reliable internet connection for video calls with screen sharing



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with service business lead gen (clinics, medspas, dental, home services, etc.)

- Familiarity with Meta Instant Forms (Lead Ads)

- Experience coaching or training others (not just running ads yourself)

- Knowledge of Google Ads (I plan to learn this next, so a coach who knows both platforms is a bonus)



Compensation & Details

$15 AUD per hour (~$10.50 USD) paid per session

3 hours per week = $45 AUD/week (~$31.50 USD/week)

Paid weekly via Wise, PayPal, or direct transfer

Duration: 6-8 weeks initially, with potential to extend if needed

This is a part-time coaching engagement, not a full-time role



How to Apply

To apply, please do the following:

Record a 3-5 minute Loom video (loom.com — it’s free) walking me through how you would structure a lead generation campaign for a service business spending $500-$1,500/month on ads. Show your screen with Ads Manager open if possible. Explain your reasoning as you go.

In your application message, tell me: (a) How many years you’ve been running
 Ads, (b) The types of businesses/industries you’ve worked with, (c) One specific campaign result you’re proud of (budget, CPL, industry), and (d) Why you’d be a good teacher (not just a good media buyer).

Start your application with the word “MENTOR” so I know you read the full listing.



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered. I’m not looking for someone who just clicks buttons — I want someone who can explain the strategy behind every decision.

title: Agency Operations Manager
description:

The ideal person is someone who thinks independently, solves problems, and takes pride in building organized systems that actually work.



If you need constant instruction or supervision, this role will not be a fit.



What You'll Be Responsible For



You will act as the operations hub for the agency.



Typical responsibilities include:



• Building landing pages for campaigns

• Designing marketing materials (flyers, graphics, event assets)

• Setting up campaign systems such as QR codes, booking calendars, and lead capture pages

• Onboarding new clients into our fulfillment systems

• Coordinating internal team members to ensure work is completed on time

• Leading the internal “pod” responsible for delivering results for each client

• Monitoring timelines and making sure nothing falls behind

• Observing the business and identifying operational bottlenecks

• Recommending and implementing solutions to improve efficiency



This role requires someone who can see problems before they happen and take initiative to solve them.



Example Projects You Might Run



One week you may be responsible for:



• Designing and launching a home show marketing campaign

• Building a landing page with a booking calendar and QR code

• Coordinating internal team members to prepare marketing assets

• Onboarding a new client into the agency system

• Identifying bottlenecks slowing down fulfillment and implementing solutions



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems and making organizations run smoothly.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Thinks independently and solves problems without waiting for instructions

• Takes ownership and pride in the quality of your work

• Thinks in systems and processes

• Communicates clearly and professionally

• Can manage multiple moving parts at once

• Is comfortable leading projects and coordinating people



You are not just completing tasks.

You are helping run the operation.



Required Skills



• Experience with marketing or digital agencies

• Strong organizational and project management ability

• Excellent written communication



Bonus if you have experience with:



• CRM systems

• marketing campaign setup

• automation tools

• agency fulfillment workflows

• Landing page builders (GoHighLevel, Webflow, Wordpress, etc.)

• Basic design tools (Canva, Figma, Photoshop, etc.)



Compensation

Performance Bonuses:

• $100 if all deadlines were met

• $50 if client satisfaction scores are high

• Additional bonuses based on operational improvements and performance



High performers will have opportunities for larger bonuses and leadership growth as the agency scales. You can earn an additional $500 USD per month in 



Who Should Apply



This role is perfect for someone who:



• Wants real responsibility

• Enjoys solving operational problems

• Wants to help build systems inside a growing company



If you're looking for a simple task-based VA job, this is not the right role.



How to Apply

-Dar seguimiento a correos electrónicos, cotizaciones, solicitudes y pagos / Follow up on

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in hotel maintenance or facility management.



-Experiencia en coordinación de equipos remotos y contratistas externos / Proven

experience coordinating remote teams and external contractors.

-Organización y planificación estratégica / Strategic organization and planning.

-Orientación a resultados y eficiencia operativa / Results-oriented and operational

efficiency.



Condiciones del puesto / Position Conditions

-Contratación a tiempo completo, gestionando equipos ext
