title: Pinterest Growth Specialist (Remote/Part-Time)
description:
Company: The Foreign Fork LLC 

Reports to: Alexandria Ulmer

Role Type: Freelance / Part-Time (approx 10 hours per week)

Role Overview

We are looking for a Pinterest Growth Specialist to take ownership of our Pinterest presence. Your primary goal is to drive consistent, high-volume traffic to our blog by identifying top-performing content, creating high-quality "Fresh Pins," and managing a year-long scheduling strategy. You will be responsible for taking our most successful recipes and turning them into a visual engine for growth.



Key Responsibilities

1. Data Analysis & Strategy

Conduct weekly audits of Pinterest Analytics to identify high-performing content based on Outbound Clicks.

Monitor the performance of the "Top 30 Days" and "Top 90 Days" to determine which recipes need "Fresh Pin" variations.

Track pin creation progress in an editorial calendar or spreadsheet to ensure no top-performing post is overlooked.



2. Content Creation (Graphic Design)

Produce a minimum of 5 high-quality pin variations for every top-performing blog post.

Utilize and adapt existing templates (Canva or similar) to maintain a fast, efficient "drag-and-drop" workflow.

Experiment with diverse color palettes, bold typography, and layout styles to determine what resonates with our audience.

Ensure all creative assets include the company URL and branding to protect intellectual property.



3. SEO & Board Management

Optimize Pinterest boards with keyword-rich descriptions and categorized titles.

Perform keyword research using the Pinterest search bar and "keyword bubbles" to inform pin titles and descriptions.

Utilize AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT) to generate 5+ unique, SEO-optimized captions and titles for each pin variation.



4. Advanced Scheduling (Tailwind)

Manage the Tailwind queue to ensure a consistent daily posting volume (20+ pins/day).

Execute a long-term "Interval Strategy": spacing out pin variations over 7-day intervals and scheduling them months in advance to ensure content longevity.

Manage distributions to both personal boards and high-performing group boards.



Required Skills & Experience

Pinterest Expert: Deep understanding of the Pinterest algorithm, "Fresh Pin" requirements, and Pinterest Analytics.

Tailwind Proficiency: Experience with Tailwind’s "Original Publisher," "Interval Scheduling," and "SmartLoop" features.

Graphic Design: Proficiency in Canva (or similar tools) with a "good eye" for food/lifestyle aesthetics and complementary font pairings.

SEO & AI Literacy: Ability to identify high-ranking keywords and use AI to streamline the creation of descriptions and titles.

Organization: Must be able to self-manage a high volume of assets and keep a detailed log of what has been pinned.



Qualities We’re Looking For

Efficiency: You can "fire hose" through a list of recipes and turn them into beautiful pins quickly.

Growth-Minded: You enjoy looking at the "needle" and finding ways to move it through experimentation.

Independent: Once you understand the workflow, you can run the Pinterest account with minimal oversight.

Join a mission-driven company empowering women across Asia to live stronger, healthier, and happier lives.

We’re growing fast — and we’re looking for a highly organised, proactive, and loyal Executive Assistant to support our leadership team and keep daily operations running like clockwork.

s — screen, prioritise, and draft replies

 ???? WHAT YOU’LL LOVE ABOUT WORKING WITH US

title: Influencer Research & Outreach VA (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED) - 8
description:
TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA SCROLLING INTO A REMOTE JOB (Influencer Research + DM VA)

If you spend way too much time on Instagram/TikTok checking gym creators, this might be the easiest job you ever land.



We’re a Gen-Z–run app studio building a fast-growing fitness app, and we’re hiring VAs to help us research, reach out to, and build relationships with influencers.



- No experience required.

- No resume required.

- Just strong English + good judgment + social media instincts.

- Must work NYC timezones! (in between 9am to 5pm)



If you understand gym culture, talk like a human, and type like a native English speaker, you’re already ahead of 99% of applicants.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

This role is part lead generation, part DM outreach, part relationship management.



Your daily tasks:

- Find new fitness creators (gym/lifting niche only)

- Add them to our Google Sheet with the correct info (username, followers, country,
, etc.)

- Evaluate their profile quality (are they legit, on-brand, and worth reaching out to?)

- DM influencers using our scripts

- Handle the conversation in a friendly, natural, professional way

- Answer questions, keep the convo alive, and push creators toward collaboration

- Follow up consistently

- Track responses and organize leads properly



You’ll basically be the person discovering new influencers and bringing them into the brand.

We’ll teach you everything, you just need strong English and social media instincts.





YOU’RE A FIT IF YOU

- Have very strong written English (this is the #1 requirement)

- Can communicate clearly and confidently

- Know the gym/fitness niche (huge bonus)

- Are organized and detail-oriented

- Can follow instructions EXACTLY

- Are comfortable reaching out to people on social media

- Have good judgment (can spot fake/farm accounts instantly)

- Are under 28 (our team is young)

- Want part-time remote work you can do from anywhere



We don’t care about degrees. We care about output, consistency, and attitude.





WHAT WE OFFER

- Remote work

- Fast replies, fast onboarding

- Fun Gen-Z team

- Simple tasks anyone smart can do

- Performance-based promotions

- The chance to handle creator deals + negotiations once you prove yourself





TEST 1 (WHEN APPLIYING) — Influencer Sheet Review + Research



Use this Google Sheet template (make a copy of the sheet to modify it): 
/drive/folders/1hDVQyxHEi-ZmaKfmGk1KWSzqrxKSM-Q7?usp=sharing



You must complete:

Rows 3–13 — PASS or FAIL



Look at the creators already listed and ONLY fill the PASS / FAIL column (1st column of the table).

Base your decision on:

- Fitness/gym relevance (are they a gym influencer?)

- Their country (our target audience is North American countries and 1st world countries)

- High number of views (100 000 median views minimum)

*Little tip, less than 50% are good :)*



Rows 14–23 — Add 10 New Fitness Creators (based on the same criterias that were used for rows 3-13)

Add:

- Username

- Instagram profile link

- Number of followers

- Median views per reel (approximately)

- Full name

-
 (if public)

- Country



These must be real gym/lifting creators. No deep digging. Just fast and accurate.





TEST 2 (AFTER YOU GOT SELECTED FOR THE 2ND ROUND) — 1-3 Minutes Introduction Video



Record a simple phone video (no editing needed) and answer:

- Who you are

- Any experience with customer support jobs, social media or research

- How comfortable you are chatting with influencers through DMs

- Why you’re a good fit for this role



Just speak clearly and naturally.





HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this job post with:

A Google Drive link containing:

- Your completed Google Sheet (for TEST 1 tasks)



Answers to these short questions (in text form in the message you send when applying):

- How many hours/day or week can you work?

- Are you comfortable with NYC TIME hours full-time?

- Are you comfortable handling DM conversations?



Applications missing either test 1 OR answers to the questions will be ignored automatically.

Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: Sales Representative

Location: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Type: Full-Time or Part-Time (Flexible)

Salary: Competitive base + commission (PHP 30,000 - 50,000 base + uncapped commissions, depending on experience)

Company: We are a growing agency specializing in GoHighLevel, delivering powerful CRM, marketing automation, funnel building, and sales tools to help businesses worldwide streamline operations and scale faster.

Job Description:

We're looking for a driven, experienced Sales Representative to join our team. Your main role will be generating high-quality leads and closing deals for our GoHighLevel services. If you have solid sales experience, enjoy outreach and relationship-building, and perform well remotely, this is a great opportunity to earn strong commissions while supporting business growth.

Key Responsibilities:

Generate leads through cold outreach,
 campaigns, LinkedIn,
, and other channels.

Strong track record of generating your own leads (cold
, LinkedIn prospecting, etc.).

Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

Self-starter with great discipline for remote work.

Reliable internet, computer, and headset.

Bonus: Familiarity with tools like 
, 
, Lemlist, or other sales automation software.

What We Offer:
